programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: P.C.
programme.desc: A woman is found bleeding from her neck and dies before reaching the hospital. Benson and Stabler investigate a death metal band called Vampyre Sacrifyce, whose front man claims he was nowhere near the victim.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Witness
programme.desc: When a young girl is raped in her apartment building's stairwell, Detectives Benson and Stabler find her shaken at the hospital. After meeting her boyfriend, the detectives think she may have made the story up for attention, until a witness is revealed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Disabled
programme.desc: A disabled woman is beaten and raped and her condition leaves her unable to speak. Benson and Stabler are able to conclude that someone close to her is responsible and that leads them to her sister and nephew.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Bedtime
programme.desc: When an investigative journalist is found murdered in her bed, it reminds the detectives of a case from 30-years earlier.

programme.title: Movie: Doctor Strange
programme.desc: When a neurosurgeon loses the use of his hands in an accident, he finds himself at a mystical enclave. Healing his hands, he trains there as a sorcerer. When a new threat emerges, he must decide whether to return to his life or defend the world.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Late Show
programme.desc: Jay pulls some strings to get reservations at the new restaurant for an adult's night out. But, in each household, everyone is running late -- Gloria, as usual, is taking forever to get ready, and Claire and Phil are concerned about Luke being home alone.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Help
programme.desc: When Gloria hires a too-good-to-be-true male nanny, Jay and Manny are pretty much dead set against it. Frank is in town and feeling a bit lonely recently, so Phil and Jay take him out to help get his groove back. Mitch and Cam plan their wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Fair to Remember

programme.title: Modern Family: ClosetCon '13

programme.title: Modern Family: The Big Game

programme.title: Modern Family: And One to Grow On

programme.title: Bones: The Woman in the Car

programme.title: Bones: The Superhero in the Alley

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' How the Grinch Stole Christmas

programme.title: South Park: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off the Fatty Foods
programme.desc: The planetarium has a strange pull on the townspeople, and the boys must uncover the diabolical plot to control the minds of South Park's citizens. Meanwhile, Cartman auditions for a Cheesy Poofs commercial.

programme.title: South Park: Fourth Grade

programme.title: South Park: Proper Condom Use
programme.desc: In a time-honoured tradition and right-of-passage, the boys are separated from the girls and schooled in the mysteries of sex by none other than Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples

programme.title: South Park: Jared Has Aides

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt

programme.desc: Leslie and Ben organize a black tie gala to raise money for their park, but their plans are derailed when a city wide emergency response drill is called.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: A Benihana Christmas
programme.desc: Strife on the party planning committee results in two competing Christmas parties. In the meantime, Michael sends out inappropriate photo-shopped Christmas cards and gets his heart broken by his girlfriend, Carol.

programme.title: The Office: A Benihana Christmas
programme.desc: Strife on the party planning committee results in two competing Christmas parties. In the meantime, Michael sends out inappropriate photo-shopped Christmas cards and gets his heart broken by his girlfriend, Carol.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder-Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: Movie: No Time Like Christmas
programme.desc: After bumping into each other at a bed and breakfast before Christmas, a young woman and her old college boyfriend must work together to save the local theater with the Christmas Eve show.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: A photographer returns home for Christmas just as the annual holiday light show is resurrected. She volunteers to pitch in, but soon discovers her high-school sweetheart is also helping out.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Stars
programme.desc: After thinking she's finally got a shot at a record deal, the holiday season derails a young woman's dream.

programme.title: Movie: Poinsettias for Christmas
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help the family poinsettia farm in the rush before Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Twelve Men of Christmas
programme.desc: When her boss and fiancé betray her, a New York public relations executive finds herself in a small Montana town. She soon discovers that, when it comes to matters of the heart, a small town is just as complicated as the big city.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in the City
programme.desc: After closing down her small-town family business a woman and her child move to the big city where an old friend offers her a job in the toy department of Wolmans. The woman realizes she must bring out the true meaning of Christmas before it’s too late.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Contract
programme.desc: A woman brings her best friend's brother home for Christmas after she finds out her ex will be there with his new girlfriend. She is unsure of the arrangement, so her best friend, a lawyer, draws up a contract to give them both something they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Tums Ultimate Tailgate: Where the Fans Eat!
programme.desc: Homecoming 2019 and super tailgating fans took center stage on HLN’s series spotlighting college and university gameday tailgating.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Capturing the Unabomber
programme.desc: In a new interview, Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of 'The Unabomber.'

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mystery in the Closet
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jessica and Matthew Boynton seemed like the picture-perfect couple until the young mother is found unresponsive and covered in blood inside her locked bedroom closet, and doesn't remember how she ended up there.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury, forcing him to take a calculated risk that nearly turns deadly. After his luck turns, Fred's dives on his 76th birthday to decode a bedrock gold mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Monster Red Lives
programme.desc: In search of big nuggets, Rick buys a monster washplant. A flood puts Tony's new claim in jeopardy. Parker needs to move Big Red in record time. Dustin's crew finds a claim, but must make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred introduces a new miner.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Motherlode Mountain
programme.desc: Rick must decide whether to mine gold or put his new washplant together. Parker tests his new co-foreman.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Washplant Wars
programme.desc: Rick races to get Monster Red running after losing his only way to mine gold. A dangerous storm shuts down Parker's operation. The Beets family push to get Monica's potentially gold-rich cut up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: No Time For Redemption
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker brings in a new crew member, the Beets run an important test on Monica's Hunker Creek claim and Rick calls on Freddy Dodge to fix Monster Red.

programme.title: Gold Rush: When The Levee Breaks
programme.desc: Rick's season hangs in the balance when an engineering disaster shuts him down. Parker sinks a ton of money into a new claim. Tony gets a third operation running. Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Brother vs. Brother
programme.desc: It's brother vs. brother as Peter and Mick Cooke go head to head in an epic scrapheap challenge to build a monster opal hunting machine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: When The Levee Breaks
programme.desc: Rick's season hangs in the balance when an engineering disaster shuts him down. Parker sinks a ton of money into a new claim. Tony gets a third operation running. Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Brother vs. Brother
programme.desc: It's brother vs. brother as Peter and Mick Cooke go head to head in an epic scrapheap challenge to build a monster opal hunting machine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Rise of Rick Ness
programme.desc: The extraordinary life of America's favourite new mine boss, Rick Ness. From college football to touring with a rock n roll band, and finally ending up in the Yukon as Parker's right hand man. We see what led Rick to decide to start a claim of his own.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Finding Escobar's Millions: The Chemist
programme.desc: A former Escobar chemist claims to know where $30 million in cash and gold is buried. Chris and Ramon investigate a new property with secret tunnels.

programme.title: Finding Escobar's Millions: Endgame
programme.desc: An informant's erratic behavior forces the team to decide between shutting down the operation and investigating one more narco property that could be the big one.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Pro Bass Tour: Bass Pro Tour: 2019 REDCREST Elimination Round Two, La Crosse
programme.desc: The Elimination Round Two of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour REDCREST, from La Crosse Wisconsin.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Special Effects Artist
programme.desc: Mike exposes the fascinating secrets behind the dirty world of special effects. He explores this very strange world as special effects artist, Toby Sells, transforms him into a real life zombie. Also, Mike gets dirty harvesting kelp.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Detective
programme.desc: Mike joins the team at Purdue University's DECOMP Forensic Entomology Lab as they dig through pig carcasses searching for maggots and other insects.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Woolen Mill Operator
programme.desc: Mike spends a day working at Ohio Valley Natural Fibers where he makes yarn from fleece. Then he goes to work at a day spa in Michigan where he helps wax hair off of his good friend Barsky.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sea Lamprey Exterminator
programme.desc: In Michigan, Mike helps the U.S. Department of Fish & Wildlife control the sea lamprey population that is jeopardizing the fishing industry of the Great Lakes. Then at Mandalay Bay Casino Mike makes 'meat gel' to feed the fish in the shark reef aquarium.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Pinsetter Mechanic
programme.desc: Mike travels to Fremont, CA, to help maintain a bowling centre. Then he responds to a letter from one of his fans who wants to see more footage of cameraman Doug.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Lightning Rod Installer
programme.desc: Mike travels to Lucedale, Mississippi to try his hand at installing a lightning rod system on a home.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Exotic Nanny
programme.desc: Mike travels to Texas to help out at a ranch that harbours and breeds different exotic animal species including lemurs, sloths, bearcats and camels.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Larry Returns
programme.desc: Theresa reads a young girl whose parents believe she may also possess the gift of communicating with those who have passed. It's an emotional family reunion when Theresa's ex-husband Larry returns to Long Island for Victoria's engagement party.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Keeping the Faith
programme.desc: Theresa conducts a group reading for people of different faiths to show how everyone is connected by Spirit. A pastor, a rabbi, a practicing Buddhist and members of the Hindu faith receive meaningful readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Clearing the List
programme.desc: Reaching out to fans who've been on her mailing list for a decade, Theresa does a series of big group readings to clear her list. A man grieves as he wasn't able to save his dad, and two moms are reconnected to their children who took their own lives.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: I Did Not See This Coming
programme.desc: A group of women are visited by the best friend they lost, plus, Theresa's parents act as accomplices to bring peace to some friends.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Beyond the Read: Stars and Spirits
programme.desc: Theresa's in Hollywood to read stars of the past and present. 80's superstar Taylor Dayne, Say Yes To The Dress Atlanta's Monte Durham, The Office's Kate Flannery, Roseanne's Michael Fishman, and Family Matters' dad Reginald VelJohnson.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Will Victoria Say Yes?
programme.desc: Theresa brings Victoria and the whole family on an excursion to choose a wedding dress. Then, Theresa reunites a hearing-impaired client with the loved ones who supported her. Later, Theresa visits a jail to read an inmate separated from her by glass.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Switched in the Hospital
programme.desc: Lisa tackles the challenging mystery of why a woman was abandoned in a trash can as a baby. Unexpected DNA results throw a woman's entire identity into question - but no one is prepared for the shocking details Chris unearths about the day she was born.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: That Was My One Shot
programme.desc: Long Lost Family sees a dramatic turn of events as Chris and Lisa investigate two seemingly different cases. A chance discovery raises the tantalizing prospect that the mother and son they're helping may be looking for one another.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happy Wife, Happy Life?
programme.desc: Pao enjoys her Miami life while Russ struggles in Oklahoma. Danielle tries to move on. Mohamed starts over, but a visitor halts his progress. Jorge reveals a secret to Anfisa. Loren misses NY and her BFF. Chantel and Pedro deal with betraying her family.

programme.title: Four Houses: Deck the Halls
programme.desc: In New York, Marie puts her refined holiday decorations up against Kevin's Christmas light spectacular.

programme.title: Invasion of the Christmas Lights
programme.desc: This holiday special criss-crosses the U.S. to chronicle families of extreme Christmas lighting enthusiasts, and documenting their glorious, outrageous and elaborate displays.

programme.title: Invasion of the Christmas Lights 2
programme.desc: We criss-cross the U.S. and visit six homes where wizards of light out-do the neighbours and put on holiday displays that dazzle.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection 2
programme.desc: Follow four Christmas fanatics as they reveal the amount of time, money and effort they put into their obsessions all year-round.

programme.title: Christmas Crazy
programme.desc: We dash from coast-to-coast to find the most decked-out for the holiday homes, stores and everything in-between.

programme.title: Christmas Crazier
programme.desc: The ultimate guide to over-the-top Christmas attractions, including a Brookyln neighbourhood's insane Christmas lights, a massive ugly Christmas sweater party and Yosemite's 7-course feast.

programme.title: Extreme Christmas Trees
programme.desc: Captures the anticipation, excitement and sheer joy embodied by the ultimate Christmas icon: The Christmas Tree.

programme.title: Santa Sent Me to the ER
programme.desc: It's 'Ho, Ho, Oh No!' as we unwrap the hilarious details of what really happens when Christmas cheer leads to 'Oh Dear.' Real people confess how their holiday dreams turned into yuletide nightmares full of bumps, bruises and broken Christmas spirits.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Am I Worth to You?
programme.desc: Anny is frustrated with Robert's promised shopping spree. Tania and Syngin disagree on their future plans. Anna feels Mursel is asking too much from her. Emily goes into labour, but there are complications. Then, meet new couple Mike and Natalie.

programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo discover that life is hard out here for a Josh, reveal what you have to do to get super fired, and see what it takes for a dog to become a K-8.

programme.desc: Youtube Prankster Vitaly Zdorovetskiy joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to meet some natural born pranksters, travel to the broviet union and learn a few swole shortcuts.

programme.desc: TV personality and Loveline legend, Dr. Drew Pinsky and Rob take a look at some wild people and wonder 'What Went Wrong?' Check out some strong seniors flex their 'Grey Guns.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches Plus
programme.desc: Guy travels to find a homemade meatloaf sandwich topped with cranberry compote.

programme.desc: A food truck shuckin' and frying oysters for a po boy in Vancouver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Haunts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's takin' a spin through the town favourites. In Chatham, N.J., the real deal Italian joint bakin' up some righteous fried chicken, arancini balls and the decadent sacred swine sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Stuffed and Twisted
programme.desc: Guy is checking out funky foods from coast to coast. In Monterey California, the second generation Italian place is serving mom's recipes like meaty lasagne and minestrone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multicultural Cooking
programme.desc: Guy digs into traditions from many cultures, including tortillas, tacos, Jewish deli food, and Puerto-Rican specialties.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads up to the North Pole, Alaska, for all kinds of Christmas favorites: Holiday ham with wild Alaskan cranberries; Reindeer hoagies; Santa burgers; and desserts that look good enough to put under the tree.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri is getting culture shock, starting with a French-inspired Hawaiian hot spot transformed from a hole-in-the-wall lunch counter to a dine-in destination.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unique Eats
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is grabbin' some unique eats. First, in Santa Fe, N.M., a not-your-everyday Indian spot servin' up favorites like dosas and lamb curry. Then, a deli in Reno, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.desc: Guy's going international with flavors from Asia, Africa and India. In Los Angeles, a funky fast Filipino joint spicin' up house-made hot dogs and piling pork adobo onto grilled cheese.

programme.desc: Guy visits Columbus, Ohio for pierogies and a barbeque truck and Boulder, Colorado for noodles and chicken from a Thai restaurant.

programme.desc: While Fred seeks advice on how to propose marriage to Jackie, Dan and Roseanne are rekindling their romance with inspiration from the soap opera 'One Life to Live'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Altar Egos
programme.desc: When they have a titanic ego clash, Roseanne is worried about the future of Fred and Jackie's relationship. It seems they just can't make up their minds, or egos, about walking down the aisle together.

programme.title: Roseanne: Nine Is Enough
programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two for One
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan suffer from pregnancy jitters. Meanwhile, Roseanne accidentally uncovers Darlene's dark secret - she's having an affair.

programme.title: Roseanne: Snoop Davey Dave
programme.desc: There's a snitch in the Conner household. Upset over their recent breakup, David tattles on Darlene. And, to Roseanne's horror, she finds out that Darlene is experimenting with drugs.

programme.title: Roseanne: Girl Talk
programme.desc: When Jackie spills the news that Becky and Mark are having sexual problems, Roseanne steps in to solve their dilemma. The situation snowballs when the men realize that no subject is sacred when it comes to their gossiping wives!

programme.title: Roseanne: Sleeper
programme.desc: Which one of the married Conner women did David have a sexy dream about? There is a flurry of activity to figure out the 'who' and the 'why'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Follow the Son
programme.desc: D.J. is growing up, and Roseanne is having trouble loosening the apron strings. Meanwhile, David is stunned to find that Darlene's planning to move in with her new boyfriend, Jimmy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Punch and Jimmy
programme.desc: After D.J. gets pushed around by the town bully, Dan steps in to teach him the basics of self-defense. Recently dumped by Darlene, David begins overcompensating by acting 'macho'.

programme.title: Roseanne: White Men Can't Kiss
programme.desc: When DJ refuses to kiss a black girl in the school play, Dan broods over the source of DJ's racist attitudes. To everyone's surprise, Fred develops a close friendship with his mother-in-law, Bev.

programme.title: Roseanne: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Waiting for the prenatal test results leave Roseanne and Dan in a panic. Emotions run high as Roseanne mulls over her pregnancy options and consequently excludes Dan from any paternal involvement.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Parenting Trap
programme.desc: DJ's poor performance in school requires him to take 'special' classes. Dan feels he is being shut out as a parent. Darlene learns something about David and his new girlfriend's relationship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Rear Window
programme.desc: A geriatric couple with a penchant for nudity has moved in next door. Darlene worries about how close Becky and David have gotten.

programme.title: Roseanne: My Name Is Bev
programme.desc: After being arrested for drinking and driving, Bev announces that she is an alcoholic. Roseanne fears that Bev may be lying to mitigate the repercussions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Bed and Bored
programme.desc: Feigning illness for preferential treatment, Roseanne claims the doctor has ordered a week of bed rest. However, her grand scheme quickly turns stale when she finds herself bedridden and bored. Jackie and Bev come to blows.

programme.title: Roseanne: Sisters
programme.desc: Fred's unhappy that DJ's spending all his spare time at Jackie's house. Becky and Darlene find common ground.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lost Youth
programme.desc: Jackie finds her love life with Fred to be predictable. Mark is jealous of David's academic success and takes it out on his new relationship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Single Married Female
programme.desc: After discovering Jackie cavorting with another man, Dan makes the difficult decision to tell Fred. Ironically, Jackie realizes her wrongdoing in time to catch Fred moving out of the house.

programme.title: Roseanne: Husbands and Wives
programme.desc: Roseanne is up to her usual schemes. First, she cons Darlene out of a portion of her monthly allowance. Then, she plots to reunite Fred and Jackie. There's one glitch - Jackie's not sure she wants Fred back!

programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan secretly attempt to help Becky and Mark with money after they move into a shabby trailer. A further case for concern is the couple's boozy trailer-park neighbor, Sharon.

programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott
programme.desc: Max, a beloved camel, develops a large abscess on the top of his head. An adorable marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal. Later, a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is bought to the zoo for a health check.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Race to Save the Platypus
programme.desc: Terri welcomes Mballa, a new cheetah cub from South Africa, to the Australia zoo family. Meanwhile, Robert sets out to save a stranded platypus and Bindi prepares to meet Bert the koala Joey as he emerges from his mother's pouch for the first time.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Baby Kangaroo

programme.desc: Homer brings a Joe DiMaggio rookie card to Comic Book Guy, where he gets everything he has in the register for the card. With this financial windfall, the Simpson family goes Christmas shopping at the Springfield Heights Promenade.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kill Gil, Volumes 1 & 2
programme.desc: The family is stuck with an unwanted houseguest after they open their home to Gil for the Christmas holidays. After a full year, an attempt at getting him a job and many failed 'accidents,' Marge finally grows a spine and throws Gil out Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Disappointed that she is spreading holiday cheer alone, Marge sends a letter to Martha Stewart to ask for her help to save the family's Christmas. Martha comes to the rescue and transforms the house into the North Pole chalet Marge has always dreamed of.

programme.title: The Simpsons: White Christmas Blues
programme.desc: Springfield is inundated with holiday revellers after the nuclear power plant springs a radiation leak, causing snow to fall all over town. When the tourists drive up Christmas shopping prices, Marge opens up the Simpsons' house to boarders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Boy

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Every Which Way But Goose
programme.desc: Tina, discouraged by not being asked to prom by Jimmy Jr., forms an unhealthy attachment to a goose from the nearby park. Meanwhile, Linda joins a dating app to help Gretchen find a match.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: I Bob Your Pardon
programme.desc: The Belchers set out to save a turkey from a trip to the slaughterhouse, but when a local reporter catches wind of their schemes, the mission becomes more complicated than they had anticipated.

programme.title: Family Guy: Hefty Shades of Gray
programme.desc: After Peter's hair turns white from a ghost-hunting adventure in his house with the guys, his new look grabs the attention of local news anchor Tom Tucker. Under Tucker's guidance, he learns the ways of reporting fake news.

programme.desc: Two total strangers, both desperate to get to Baltimore, charter a private plane that crashes onto a remote mountain. With no hope of rescue and suffering painful injuries, the two set out together to escape the frozen and deadly wilderness.

programme.title: Movie: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Old rivalries and old flames are rekindled when a group of college friends reunite at Christmas, after 15 years.

programme.title: Movie: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: After the death of his wife, Walter gathers his family before the holidays. He asks his family for one gift, that they get along. Each member realizes it will take a miracle for them to spend five days under the same roof without killing each other.

programme.title: Movie: Gremlins
programme.desc: An unusual pet spawns a legion of vicious monsters who cause unstoppable chaos.

programme.title: Movie: WarGames
programme.desc: A young man hacks into a military computer system in which reality is confused with game-playing.

programme.title: Movie: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: A high school student decides to take the day off school and enjoy it with his friends.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Movie: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: A high school student decides to take the day off school and enjoy it with his friends.

programme.title: Movie: Gremlins
programme.desc: An unusual pet spawns a legion of vicious monsters who cause unstoppable chaos.

programme.title: Chimps of the Lost Gorge
programme.desc: A family lives in a deep, ancient forested gorge in Uganda, that runs through Africa's savannah, of which has been cut off from the rest of the jungle for 15 years.

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary
programme.desc: Sue Perkins travels to Chimp Haven, the US national chimpanzee sanctuary in Louisiana, to visit six female ex-laboratory chimpanzees starting retirement.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Experts spend an entire season in Alaska to see what it takes for a grizzly to survive.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Alaska's famous salmon run arrives, and Parsnip and Puski return to feed, but face fierce competition.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: Prison Women: Females on Guard
programme.desc: The female corrections officers of the Miami-Dade County Jail guard a nearly all-male population, fighting a constant battle against inmate violence and sexual harassment.

programme.title: Prison Women: Texas Hold 'Em
programme.desc: At Dallas County Jail in Texas, women officers battle for survival and respect while guarding some of the most dangerous inmates in the country.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Against the Wall
programme.desc: Enter the locked-down world of Ohio’s intake prison. For the newly convicted, the Correctional Reception Center (CRC) in Orient, Ohio, is their last view of the free world.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Inmates face hard times as the day of their court appearance draws near. Follow two people waiting for their day of judgement: a man who claims to a stroke kept him from understanding the crime and a woman who changed her confession.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: World Without Men
programme.desc: Welcome to Georgia's largest facility for women, Lee Arrendale State Prison. Here, drugs, hustles and illegal sexual relationships make up much of the world behind bars. We'll meet inmates coping with their prison sentence in unusual ways.

programme.title: Lockdown: On the Inside: Young Blood
Hard Time: Locked Up: The Hustle
programme.desc: At one of Ohio's toughest prisons, three young inmates try three very different strategies as they confront challenges from the system and from each other.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: World Without Men

programme.title: Lockdown: Inside Maximum Security
programme.desc: Oak Park Heights Supermax is built partially underground and combines innovative architecture, cutting-edge technology and expertly trained staff to control some of the most violent prisoners in the system.

programme.title: Lockdown: Life on the Outside
programme.desc: For many ex-cons, life after prison remains a constant struggle. For many, the first three months determine whether they put prison behind them or return to their criminal ways. Few ex-cons manage finding work, facing family and confronting the past.

programme.title: Lockdown: Gang vs. Family
programme.desc: A gang's loyalty so strong that membership is passed from one generation to another.

programme.title: Lockdown: Gangland
programme.desc: For the most violent, powerful, and infamous inmates, this is the last stop in prison purgatory: Pelican Bay State Prison, California. For two decades it has been at the heart of California's war on one of the greatest scourges in America- prison gangs.

programme.title: Lockdown: Inmate University
programme.desc: A college education program run by inmates to teach the importance of education.

programme.title: Lockdown: Shanks and Shakedowns
programme.desc: Nearly everyone arrested on felony charges in Cleveland must await trial in Cuyahoga County Jail. We take you on an in-depth look at the facility and it's Special Response Team working against gangs who prey on other inmates.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Land of Dragons
programme.desc: Central Indonesia is a wild, volcanic world where life thrives and dragons rule.

programme.desc: The western Indonesian islands of Borneo and Sumatra are home to rare species.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Lost Worlds

programme.title: Animals Doing Things with Howie Mandel: Apocalypse Meow
programme.desc: Featured today are pig fashions, monkey misdemeanors and Howie's over the top pet snack service.

programme.title: World's Funniest Dogs
programme.desc: This one-hour special features some of the funniest dog videos to craze the Internet.

programme.title: World's Smallest Pets
programme.desc: Pets come in all shapes and sizes. Sometimes, the smaller they are, the stranger they get. Meet some of the world's smallest pets.

programme.title: Supersized Pets
programme.desc: Pets come in all shapes and sizes. Sometimes, the bigger they are, the stranger they get. Meet some of the world's weirdest supersized pets.

programme.title: Super Underdogs
programme.desc: Our canine companions are extraordinary animals. Some are small, others large and some are in a league all their own. These dogs were born with unusual characteristics and they're pushing boundaries, taking their owners along for a fun ride.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramid of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals, and new discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets behind the fall of the Inca capital of Cusco.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: America Unearthed: The Ripper Unmasked
programme.desc: Scott Wolter investigates a sensational new theory about the identity of Jack the Ripper. He also uncovers a connection between the ritualistic patterns of the Ripper murders and the Freemasons.

programme.title: America Unearthed: Alien Artifacts
programme.desc: Scott Wolter bushwhacks his way through the jungles of Veracruz, Mexico, as he investigates ancient artifacts that could shatter the archaeological record forever and change everything we know about our place in the universe.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: America Unearthed: The Ripper Unmasked
programme.desc: Scott Wolter investigates a sensational new theory about the identity of Jack the Ripper. He also uncovers a connection between the ritualistic patterns of the Ripper murders and the Freemasons.

programme.title: America Unearthed: Alien Artifacts
programme.desc: Scott Wolter bushwhacks his way through the jungles of Veracruz, Mexico, as he investigates ancient artifacts that could shatter the archaeological record forever and change everything we know about our place in the universe.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New discoveries lead investigators to a crypt rumored to hold the Ark of the Covenant. When great white shark is killed, experts suspect a mysterious ocean monster. Strange markings in the desert might be a tribute to an ancient spider god.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Death Threat
programme.desc: The warden receives an anonymous letter from an inmate threatening to organize a group to attack correctional officers.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Amber/ Herman
programme.desc: A young mother falls in with the wrong crowd and becomes an accomplice.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Betty/ Josh
programme.desc: Police chase a woman suffering from mental illness across state lines.

programme.desc: Penny Knell is admitted to a special care facility, where a devious mastermind is waiting to prey upon society's most vulnerable. When Penny's family gets caught in her web, the consequences will be fatal.

programme.title: Diabolical: When All Else Fails
programme.desc: After her home is invaded and her husband murdered, Shaunna Dodd recounts her harrowing ordeal at gunpoint. But when investigators dig deeper, they uncover a tale of lies, infidelity, and shady characters who have wandered into the Washoe Valley.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime: Evidence of Prejudice
programme.desc: A Hispanic teenager is murdered, and another young man is accused of the killing. What looks like an open and shut case opens up a world of racism and hatred within the United States.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime: Killing in the Classroom
programme.desc: A teenager is relentlessly bullied due to his sexuality. One day, he chooses to take a knife to school for protection, which unleashes a sensation in the press and pits members of the city against one-another.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime: God is His Witness
programme.desc: A man sits on death row, accused of 'honour' killings linked to his daughter. His past is examined, and his once-buried secrets begin to come to the surface, telling a completely different story.

programme.title: Body Cam: The Chase
programme.desc: A dangerous felon has stolen a truck and will ram anything in his path; On a freezing winter night a lone officer is attacked by a crazed half naked man; At a County Jail, a gunman fires at unarmed officers, leaving one fighting for his life.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime: Killing in the Classroom
programme.desc: A teenager is relentlessly bullied due to his sexuality. One day, he chooses to take a knife to school for protection, which unleashes a sensation in the press and pits members of the city against one-another.

programme.title: Body Cam: The Chase
programme.desc: A dangerous felon has stolen a truck and will ram anything in his path; On a freezing winter night a lone officer is attacked by a crazed half naked man; At a County Jail, a gunman fires at unarmed officers, leaving one fighting for his life.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime: Evidence of Prejudice
programme.desc: A Hispanic teenager is murdered, and another young man is accused of the killing. What looks like an open and shut case opens up a world of racism and hatred within the United States.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: After a beloved Florida physician was found dead in his mansion, police wade through his secret, dark past for clues.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in Apartment 1601?
programme.desc: Three friends, all with big futures ahead of them, headed to a studio apartment near Washington, D.C., after a night of barhopping. Sometime afterwards, one of them was butchered with a knife; the two survivors told police they don't know what happened.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunter
programme.desc: When Kelli Bordeaux didn't report for duty at Ft. Bragg, everyone knew something must be wrong. The young combat medic would never go AWOL. A bounty hunter, working as a private eye, would then develop an unusual relationship with the suspect.reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in the Sutton Place Apartment?
programme.desc: It's a story of wealth, privilege, and an early morning after-party that went terribly wrong. Erin Moriarty explores the last night of Joey Comunale's life and the cases against two privileged young men for taking part in a murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: A wealthy labour lawyer shoots his high profile wife from the back seat of a car, and questions are raised about whether it was an accident or plain murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Marked for Murder
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when an esteemed criminal law professor and father of two, is executed in his garage. Investigators follow a series of leads that take them on a statewide hunt through Florida, in search of the murderous masterminds.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Wrath of Love
programme.desc: Zach Sanders is being pulled in two directions between the woman he loves and his mistress who refuses to let him go. Jealousy, obsession and news of a surprise engagement leads to a deadly case of road rage.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Red Wedding
programme.desc: A chance encounter on a NY subway brings hard-working immigrant Gladys Ricart love, and introduces her to a lush world she'd never imagined. But her plans for a dream wedding turn into a devastating nightmare.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: From Diamonds to Death
programme.desc: Ann McDonald's wealthy husband Rich cares more about social status than her happiness. When she seeks solace in Al Braunberger's arms, it unleashes a side of Rich she's never seen and a side of Al she never expected, trapping her in a deadly game.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Evil Eye
programme.desc: Not long after Patrick Brown falls for a woman named Cece, he is plagued by mysterious phone calls and a creepy sense that someone is watching him. He begins to wonder if it might be a figment of his imagination.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Deadly Phantom Coup
programme.desc: The CIA use psychological warfare in Guatemala, 1954, as part of the coup d'état which changed history. In a top-secret operation using covert radio broadcasts to create a 'phantom' army, combined with a guerilla invasion trained by a top agents.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Rich Widow
programme.desc: Brian Maurice Fuller charms his way into wealthy people's homes, only to rob them blind. He gets caught, does his time and is released. But Fuller can't resist the lure of robbing the rich. He eludes police until a tip leads them right to his door.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Plastic Surgery
programme.desc: Courtenay Savage is an ex-cop with a loaded gun aimed at a friend's trailer. She has no idea she is caught on tape. After an arrest and posting bail, she goes on the run, leaving ties to the police department and the sex industry.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Kill my Step-Dad
programme.desc: When teenager Randy Baggett can't take any more of his abusive stepfather, he gets help from a friend and they beat and choke him to death. Two years later, Randy gets locked up, but he escapes twice, keeping police and detectives on their toes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Revenge
programme.desc: Marshall Brown was 19 when he committed his first contract killing. A drug dealer put a hit out on Horace Morrison. Brown was soon convicted and spent the next 19 years in prison planning his escape. This is the story of his life on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Plastic Surgery

programme.desc: A classic western gunfight, a battle between a US naval patrol and a German U-Boat, a stagecoach bandit hell bent on revenge and a revolutionary tactic that turned the course of a war.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Four different stories that of events that happened against all odds.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Courage Under Fire
programme.desc: Four stories of courage under fire; a symbol of luck saves Marines in Korea; a handheld weapon protects Europe during the Cold War; an instrument sends a ship off to its depths and a letter helps write victory during the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: From the ashes of the Confederacy rises a bold rebel outlaw determined to get rich and get even. Jesse James is seen by many as a modern day Robin Hood, a Southern gentleman avenging the efforts of Northern businessmen to exploit his territory.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: Lester M. Gills began his crime career at an early age in a street gang in the Chicago slums.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Wild Bill: Marskman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own, by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Seth Bullock: Sheriff of Deadwood

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Parkville Farmhouse
programme.desc: The team heads to Parkville, MD, to salvage a classic farmhouse. They remove steel from the front porch, doors, and windows from the outside while inside they work to remove radiators, banisters and wainscotting.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Pinehurst Steam Plant
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to Pinehurst, NC, to salvage an old steam plant that used to run the town. They remove some cool valves and find extra salvage in a shed near the building.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Downtown Kannapolis
programme.desc: The Dawgs split in two groups to salvage doors, sinks and more in Kannapolis, North Carolina.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Apple Barn
programme.desc: The team heads to Winchester, VA, to salvage an abandoned orchard barn but they must pick through years of trash and treasures before they begin.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Marine Salvage
programme.desc: Mike and Robert head to Amelia Island, Florida, and get lessons in diving and safety so they can salvage under water. They recover old ship parts from the bottom of the ocean and transform them into an original piece.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Price Fuller Machine Shop
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, Grayson and Tay head to the Machine Shop they bought to see what they can find. The team finds items for new builds. As they're renovating the house on their property, they find many new builds are needed. Mike and Tay make a coffee bar.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To K-Town
programme.desc: Mike and Tay build a commemorative clock for the town of Kannapolis, North Carolina, before the crew heads back to salvage items left behind on the first trip, including a large cupola, windows and a bank vault.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To The Ferry
programme.desc: The team returns to the Norfolk, VA, ferry to get the large items that were left behind, including a crow's nest and staircase.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Jack and Jill Suite
programme.desc: With the help of a 1920s mint condition porcelain sink, Nicole is able to transform the Jack and Jill bathroom in her Grand Boulevard home without sacrificing its antique integrity.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Overhaul
programme.desc: If Nicole is going to turn the entire third floor of her Grand Boulevard estate into a master suite, a custom new bathroom will have to be the first step.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rehab Attic
programme.desc: Nicole's 1913 mansion in the heart of Detroit is topped with an old, dusty attic that was once servant's quarters.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Grand Garage
programme.desc: The century-old Tudor house is one thing, but Nicole Curtis also wants to make sure the garage is up to par.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitschy Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole tackles her grandparents' kitchen. Built in 1956, the kitchen has been around for over half a century, but was redone in the '90s, eliminating its mid-century modern charm. Nicole wants to restore the kitchen to how it looked when she was a child.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Pool Room Refresher
programme.desc: For Nicole's next project, it's gonna be sink or swim! The indoor pool that Nicole's grandfather built by hand is getting a much-needed refresher. First up, the safety and mechanical systems of the pool need to be overhauled.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: All About Family
programme.desc: Off the pool lies a dated family room, covered in wood paneling and boasting a large mechanical room for the pool equipment. Nicole sees opportunity for a beautiful bathroom, and an updated, retro family room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bathroom Remade
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis saves the original Mid-Century bathroom in her grandparents' house in her classic style; by preserving critical elements while updating tired design choices.

programme.desc: Alfonso comes to the rescue with quick fixes. P.F. Chang's Home Menu Beef and Broccoli frozen entree makes weeknight meals easy and Chocolate Chip Quaker Chewy Bars are a great snack for kids and adults both.

programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours

programme.title: Movie: Unfriended: Dark Web
programme.desc: A young man brings home a laptop abandoned in a lost-and-found bin, and in a secret file on it he discovers disturbing videos. After sharing them with his friends in an attempt to determine whether or not they're real, they find themselves targeted.

programme.title: Movie: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: Many years after a global cataclysm, civilization's remnants live in mobile predator-cities that consume all in their path. With the world's resources running out, it falls to a mysterious young woman to face her past and defeat the biggest city all.

programme.title: Queen of the World
programme.desc: 'Queen of the World' offers unique insights into Her Majesty The Queen’s role as a figure on the global stage, and the baton she is passing to the younger members of the Royal Family as they continue to build upon the Commonwealth.

programme.title: Movie: Beverly Hills Chihuahua
programme.desc: A pampered Chihuahua gets lost while on vacation in Mexico. She winds up having to get help from her friends and the locals to save herself from a dognapper seeking ransom and an evil Doberman after her diamond collar.

programme.title: Movie: Early Man
programme.desc: A peaceful tribe of Stone Age primitives has its tranquility shattered when a Bronze Age civilization moves into its valley home and forces them out. Out of desperation to get their home back, the tribe challenges the Bronze Age soccer team to a match.

programme.title: Sesame Street: A Dog and a Song

programme.title: Sesame Street's 50th Anniversary Celebration

programme.title: Movie: The Kid Who Would Be King
programme.desc: A boy finds a sword in a ruined building, and after pulling it out from a stone discovers that it is the legendary Excalibur. Chosen by destiny, he learns that he must unite his schoolyard friends and rivals to face down the evil enchantress Morgana.

programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City 2
programme.desc: When Samantha is offered an all-expenses paid trip to Abu Dhabi, Carrie, Miranda and Charlotte trade in their day-to-day lives for a little rest, relaxation and shopping in the beautiful United Arab Emirates.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: A woman on a flight, thinking the plane is about to crash, discloses all her secrets to a seeming stranger, then later finds out the man is actually the CEO of the company she is working for.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a father is searching all over town for a toy for his son. While his son is at home wondering where he is, the neighbour is hitting on his wife.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween
programme.desc: 40 years after he killed five people, Michael Myers escapes from a secure mental hospital and returns to his hometown to hunt down the one woman who escaped his rampage, but she's spent years anticipating and preparing for his inevitable return.

programme.title: Watchmen: A God Walks Into ABar
programme.desc: Angela's mysterious past in Vietnam is at last revealed.

programme.title: Ernie & Joe: Crisis Cops
programme.desc: Ernie Steven and Joe Smarro are putting compassionate policing practices into action. This film chronicles their daily encounters with people in crisis, showing how an innovative approach to policing is having a dramatic effect.

programme.title: Movie: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: A group of young people attack an alien race that has attacked Moscow through the power supply.

programme.title: Movie: I, Robot
programme.desc: In 2035, robots that have been programmed to never hurt humans have become part of the daily lives of people. When the main suspect in the murder of a scientist is a robot, a robot-hating detective begins to wonder if humans are actually safe.

programme.title: Movie: Congo
programme.desc: After an expedition fails to return from the Congo, another expedition is put together to search for them. These new explorers discover a mysterious city and a tribe of bloodthirsty gorillas in the jungle.

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A doctor who was wrongly convicted of murdering his wife escapes and goes in search of the real killer to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Planner
programme.desc: A workaholic wedding planner falls for the engaged doctor whose wedding she is organizing.

programme.title: Movie: Second Act
programme.desc: A talented but uneducated woman stuck in a low-paying job gets a call out of the blue for an interview with a well-paying company. After landing the job, she learns that it's due to a fake Facebook profile set up in her name that makes her look great.

programme.title: Flack: Dan
programme.desc: Robyn tries to get a stand up comedian out of hot water, after he is accused of being trans-phobic. Sam brings up having a baby. Robyn creates a cover up story for a client who was pictured without her fake baby bump.

programme.title: The L Word: Generation Q: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: Ten years after we last left them, we find Bette running for mayor of Los Angeles. Shane returns to the city after a setback and Alice is learning to balance co-parenting with her fiancé Nat and Nat's ex-wife Gigi.

programme.title: Shameless: Sparky
programme.desc: Frank hatches the idea for a new scheme when an unexpected visitor shows up at the Gallagher house. With Tami back in the house, Lip struggles to give up control of Fred. Debbie's fight for child support escalates and Carl juggles multiple romances.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: Hispes
programme.desc: Mayor Feratti ups the ante in his negotiations with the Sullivans, and Ray must step in to finish the deal. Bridget and Smitty are called in to fix Jonathan Walker Hanson's unsavory publicity scandal. Daryll is offered a chance to leave the Donovans.

programme.title: Movie: Taxi Driver
programme.desc: An alienated veteran's night shift as a New York cab driver fuels his urge to lash out.
