programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Mountains
programme.desc: Mountains: for generations, adventurers have always been drawn by their grandeur and their power. Meet six homeowners who had enough inspiration and drive to build their dream homes in such difficult and remote locations.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Floating Houses
programme.desc: There's a reason most folks build their homes on solid ground. Building and living on water requires extreme engineering, long patience and deep pockets. If you can make your house float, you'll spend every day anchored in heaven.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Tiny Houses
programme.desc: Building a tiny home might seem easy, but as these six homeowners found out, downsizing can be a huge challenge. For those dedicated enough to let go of all their excess, living in a tiny home can have the biggest rewards.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Waterfront
programme.desc: Whether it's oceanfront, lakefront or on a lagoon, a house on the water is the ultimate dream. But getting there is half the battle, with wild weather, construction challenges and unstable ground, these homeowners won't let anything get in their way.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Escapes
programme.desc: Many people think sipping frozen drinks on a tropical island is the ultimate escape. But these days, tree houses, themed cottages, dude ranches and even Alaska's frozen wilderness are the new way to get away.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: You Don't Forget Your Past
programme.desc: Anna's friends have concerns about Mursel. Tania and Syngin butt heads. Blake and Jasmin's reunion falls flat. Natalie anxiously waits for Mike's arrival in the Ukraine. Juliana is third wheel when she finally meets Michael's ex.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: We Need to Talk
programme.desc: Mike learns of Natalie's past heartbreak. Anna weeps in a wedding dress. Anny has issues with Robert's exes. Emily doubts Sasha's dedication. Jasmin meets Blake's friends. Tania reveals she's leaving for a month. Juliana movies into Michael's new house.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Premature Departure
programme.desc: Syngin prepares for a month apart from Tania. Anna questions her engagement. Blake and Jasmin's living situation changes unexpectedly. Leaving Russia brings Sasha to tears. Michael and Juliana talk about their financial future. Angela and Michael return.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Premature Departure
programme.desc: Syngin prepares for a month apart from Tania. Anna questions her engagement. Blake and Jasmin's living situation changes unexpectedly. Leaving Russia brings Sasha to tears. Michael and Juliana talk about their financial future. Angela and Michael return.

programme.title: Unpolished: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: The Martone ladies make a splash while shopping for Bria's wedding dress. At the salon, the sisters collaborate on a client who wants to be transformed into an alien goddess. Later, Lexi is pushed to reveal her real issues with Bria's fiancé.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Premature Departure
programme.desc: Syngin prepares for a month apart from Tania. Anna questions her engagement. Blake and Jasmin's living situation changes unexpectedly. Leaving Russia brings Sasha to tears. Michael and Juliana talk about their financial future. Angela and Michael return.

programme.desc: The Martone ladies make a splash while shopping for Bria's wedding dress. At the salon, the sisters collaborate on a client who wants to be transformed into an alien goddess. Later, Lexi is pushed to reveal her real issues with Bria's fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Sisters Act Out!
programme.desc: Two brides' opinionated sisters send the search for the ideal dress off track.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Power Play
programme.desc: Jessica may leave empty handed when her long list of demands has the staff running in circles. Monique breaks shop rules when she hands her dress decision over to her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Between a Sham-rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: A bride's mom and mother-in-law have conflicting opinions about the body art on her shoulder.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: The Mouth of the South
programme.desc: Taylor's mom tries to force her dress expectations on her daughter's big day. Christine wants a blinged-out super gown on a limited budget, but 'bling' equals 'ka-ching.'

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Baby Wants Blings
programme.desc: Bride Cynthia's biggest critic is her pint-sized 8-year-old bridesmaid, Madison, who wants the bride to wear a dress with lots of 'bling.'

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Three Cheers for the Bride!
programme.desc: A cheerleading captain struggles to maintain her sunny outlook against sharp comments, while another bride's mom looks to nip her dream dress in the bud.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Duelling Divas
programme.desc: A bride and her mother each struggle with playing second fiddle, while a young preacher's daughter gets a lesson in modesty from her granny.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Poof, There It Is
programme.desc: Hard-to-please bride Shelby has been to more than 20 salons in search of her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Secret Princess
programme.desc: A vow renewal bride hopes to shed the bad memories of her first wedding day, while another bride who feels like an ugly duckling hopes to find a dress that will transform her into a beautiful swan.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: No to the Bow
programme.desc: Kayla wants to please her strong-willed mom while shopping for a wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Worth the Weight
programme.desc: Optimistic bride Amy falls in love with a budget-busting gown and must convince Lori to let her try it on. Ambitious bride Ericia puts pressure on herself when she tries to lose 20 to 30 pounds and fit into a small dress before her big day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Battle of the Curves
programme.desc: Trina is looking for a dress that will show off her assets, despite her Mom's conservative demands. Bride Shelby wants a gown that shows a little more skin than her traditional Dad would prefer. Bride Haley faces an extra special challenge at her fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Blush-ing Brides
programme.desc: Magan wants to walk down the aisle in a gown with colour, but her unique choice has her family seeing red. Monica is looking for a princess dress to honour her late mom's wishes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: The Big Picture
programme.desc: Hannah has already purchased two gowns to please her fiancés specific dress request. Still unimpressed by either, Hannah is at the salon hoping to find a gown that represents her bridal fantasy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bridal Baggage Blues
programme.desc: People-pleaser Holly, clashes with her pushy future sister-in-law, and trying on dresses conjures up painful memories for widowed bride Chrissy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Times are A' Changing
programme.desc: Second time bride LaToya wants to walk down the aisle in a gown that puts her in the spotlight. Former pageant queen Maggie struggles to leave behind her blingy dress past. Bride Kristina returns with a circle of support for an emotional ceremony.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: First Dresses and Second Guesses
programme.desc: Hannah grew up in a children's home and was used to sharing her clothes. Now a bride, Hannah is eager to find a dress to call her own. Shawanda refuses to let her budget get in the way of her dreams. Anastasia's big gown may create even bigger problems.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Once Upon a Bride
programme.desc: Amber has always dreamed of wearing a fairy tale, princess gown on her big day but her aunt is pushing for a more grown up look. Julie is looking for the perfect dress for her vow renewal ceremony.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Dress With a Fighting Chance
programme.desc: Military bride Sarah challenges her assertive mom and friends' opinions; sorority sisters and siblings clash when bride Mon Cheri says she wants a poofy princess gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Out of Bridal Bounds
programme.desc: A sports coach loves gym attire, but her girly entourage pushes her towards something glam. Then, a bodybuilder wants a gown to show off her muscles while still looking ladylike.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: The Bridal Countdown!
programme.desc: Salina is getting married today! With the clock ticking, Lori and team must do whatever it takes to help this bride find the perfect dress. Former beauty queen now Army soldier Kelsey is caught between her pageant past and her simple style present.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Dare to be Different
programme.desc: Melody wants a fitted black dress, but her mom wants a traditional white gown. Alexa must lower her expectations when she is unable to find a trendy dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Gold Medal Gown
programme.desc: Olympic bobsledder bride Elana and her opinionated mother battle over the length of her reception dress. Bride Courtney worries that her dream dress won't please her terminal grandmother. Bride Lacie questions her ball gown decision.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: The Ties that Bind
programme.desc: Elizabeth hopes that dress shopping with her mom will convince her to attend her wedding. Rachel's low budget threatens the chance of getting her dream dress.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Over-Grooming Situation
programme.desc: Find out which trick left a producer with a wasp sting, and why several crew members left with headaches. Plus, find out why Michael wore a vest two sizes too small.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pink Slime
programme.desc: Michael feeds some book worms while working at a book store. Plus, he serves food and gives new meaning to the phrase 'grass fed beef'. Then, he spooks his assistant at a food testing center with an experiment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Flash Melt
programme.desc: Find out which trick occurred when a location fell through at the lasts second, and how the producers dealt with screaming kids during a shoot day. Plus, find out who crossed paths with Michael months after being tricked.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Game Friendly
programme.desc: Find out what tricks make Michael the most nervous, when the show needs extra security on hand and which trick was tried 18 times before anyone noticed.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Naughty Or Nice
programme.desc: Three bakers run the gamut from naughty to nice as they vie to create the definitive gingerbread showpiece. The competitors receive a competition curveball mid-challenge that requires them to switch gears.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Elf
programme.desc: Three bakers are challenged with creating a gingerbread scene inspired by the classic holiday movie 'Elf.' Host Marcela Valladolid throws a wrench in the works by challenging the bakers to create quick holiday treats for the judges to sample.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Santa's Most Incredible Workshop
programme.desc: Three bakers find fierce competition as they race to create their take on a magical gingerbread 'North Pole'. They're thrown a twist and have to think fast to create a holiday treat that's both delicious and a practical part of their final creations.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Ultimate Holiday Celebration
programme.desc: Our three finalists go all out to see who can create their biggest 'Ultimate Holiday Celebration' scene. Each baker pulls out all the stops and incorporates their own personal touches to their elaborate creations as well as holiday treats for the judges.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Traditions Turned Trendy
programme.desc: The festive fever is high in the decorating round as five trendsetting cookie makers hack classic cookie cutter shapes and decorate them with totally wild new designs.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Cookie Pairings
programme.desc: Confident and daring bakers compete to prove their holiday cookie-making skills.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Santa's Sweet Spot
programme.desc: Host Eddie Jackson thinks it's time Santa's hard-working elves get some love, too, so for the decorating round, the five talented cookie makers must make one super-sized decorated cookie for Santa plus some tiny decorated cookies for the little guys.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Christmas Family Fun
programme.desc: Host Eddie Jackson welcomes five fabulously festive cookie makers into Santa's workshop. First up is the decorating challenge where the bakers craft two different decorated Christmas tree cookies.

programme.title: Martina's Table: Delaney's Birthday
programme.desc: Martina has assembled the perfect fiesta-themed menu for her daughter's 24th birthday. She whips up fresh salsa with avocado hummus for an appetizer and sweet potato and black bean enchiladas with colourful confetti rice for the main course.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Buttermilk Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is breaking out the buttermilk, his secret weapon for brunch! First up, golden raisin-fennel soda bread with orange-buttermilk butter, followed by tender buttermilk waffles topped with golden buttermilk fried chicken.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Wine and Dine
programme.desc: Inspired by the bounty produced in nearby Sonoma and Napa counties, Guy Fieri asks his chef friends to make a meal with local wine as the star.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Cookie Party Swap
programme.desc: Valerie recreates her childhood holidays by hosting a festive party with a menu of Mrs. Bertinelli's Christmas bell cookies, tarte flambé, roasted shrimp and peppers with Chimichurri, melted snowmen peanut butter cookies and super-fast rum raisin eggnog.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Holidays
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling holiday questions, and the answers include outrageously cheesy lasagna dip and chips and a big festive salad perfect to take to any potluck bash. She covers make-ahead dessert questions with festive cinnamon apples.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast Freezer Faves
programme.desc: It's a busy day on the ranch for Ree Drummond as she fills her freezer with breakfast favorites and makes breakfast for the guys out working cattle. Her to-make list includes freezer breakfast paninis and very berry croissants.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Low-Carb Party Bites
programme.desc: Irresistible sausage stuffed mushrooms and make-ahead zucchini roll ups. Baked brie a la Ree and jalapeno cheese crisps. Finally, stunning salmon and cucumber bites and the simplest Spanish marinated olives.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas Goodies
programme.desc: It's just a few days before Christmas, and Ree Drummond is making a slew of Christmas goodies as gifts. They come in all flavors, shapes and sizes, including homemade gumdrops, cayenne cheese straws, and cornflake Christmas wreaths.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farmers' Breakfast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is showing her thanks to all the hardworking farmers with a hearty breakfast spread. She makes a crowd-pleasing Cheesy Kale Breakfast Casserole and crispy Corned Beef Hash Waffles.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Tikis and Tinsel
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is inspired to do some holiday entertaining, and to celebrate the completion of her backyard tiki bar, she's hosting a retro cocktail party complete with tiki torches, Polynesian-inspired bites and plenty of tinsel.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Pork
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing new ways to cook with pork, and she's putting bacon, sausage, kielbasa and tenderloins in the spotlight.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Giada and Raffy's Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis is on a mission to recreate a family holiday recipe called miracle rice with her beloved aunt Raffy. The dish reflects generations of stories and memories.

programme.title: The Kitchen: 'Appy Holidays
programme.desc: The Kitchen is serving up bright ideas for sweet and savory bites perfect for any holiday party. Sunny Anderson creates a DIY carving station with her easy beef tenderloin with holiday pesto.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Elf Auditions
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bennett challenges the four remaining teams of cake masters and sugar artists to create their most festive vision of how Santa Claus auditions his next crop of elves.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown: Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: Paige Davis challenges the three bakers to use their sense of humor and make their best gingerbread creations while envisioning the worst Christmas ever.

programme.desc: Charlie finds himself attracted to an older woman who writes self-help books. Alan and Jake battle over a school assignment.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Waiting for the Right Snapper
programme.desc: Charlie tries to resist temptation when he meets the grown daughter of the woman he's dating, and then realizes they've met before.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned
programme.desc: Alan falls for his cooking class teacher, who quickly moves into the house, fattens the guys up with gourmet meals, drives Berta crazy with housekeeping tips and generally turns all of their lives upside down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Taterhead Is Our Love Child
programme.desc: Charlie encounters an ex-girlfriend whose son looks an awful lot like him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Pie Hole, Herb
programme.desc: Alan lends Charlie money and crosses the line in his attempts to get it back.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Damn You, Eggs Benedict
programme.desc: Charlie tries cooking, Alan tries dating two women at the same time and Jake tries beer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Jock Strap in Hell
programme.desc: The guys bump into Jake's former teacher who became a stripper after a fling with Charlie. Charlie tries to help her out by giving her a room and a job, but things spiral out of control.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It's Always Nazi Week
programme.desc: When Judith kicks Herb to the curb, Alan comes knocking.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Best H.O. Money Can Buy
programme.desc: Alan tries to escape Judith's grasp as Charlie and Herb go on the prowl.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Pinocchio's Mouth
programme.desc: Charlie's new girlfriend asks him to spend the night at her place while Alan tries to enforce a punishment on Jake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Mooch at the Boo

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: He Smelled the Ham, He Got Excited

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Friends

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Frasier
programme.desc: Christine realizes that one reckless evening may have jeopardized her chance to begin dating Mr. Harris.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Big Bang
programme.desc: After waiting to consummate her relationship with Mr. Harris, Christine is finally ready, until Barb gives her reason to worry. Matthew rethinks medical school after discovering that his assigned cadaver is a former neighbour.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Beauty Is Only Spanx Deep
programme.desc: Christine considers plastic surgery after a pretty young waitress flirts with Mr. Harris.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Popular

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Traffic
programme.desc: Christine promises to accompany Mr. Harris to an important event but leaves him hanging when Ritchie's soccer game goes into overtime.

programme.desc: Rose writes to Soviet leader Gorbachev and receives an invitation to Moscow.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Strange Bedfellows

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments
programme.desc: The girls begin to panic when Sophia says she's moving out to go live with her son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Golden Moments

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose's Big Adventure

programme.desc: Humboldt penguins Almond and Walnut go house hunting, but an intruder is eyeing up their turf.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fighting the Flood
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas intervenes when a black bear cub gets separated from its mother and wreaks havoc on a small community. As heavy rains cause rivers to flood, Officer Eric Fluette races to rescue a man whose canoe has flipped in the rapids.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Breaking and Entering
programme.desc: Officer Lucas attempts to track down trespassers who tore up land owned by Fish and Game. On Mt. Mousilauke, Officer Towne races to assist an injured 11-year-old hiker and Officer Courtney confronts a group of fishermen about an illegal catch.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Homecoming

programme.title: North Woods Law: Over the Edge

programme.title: North Woods Law: Caught in a Lie
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne respond to an ATV accident on a mountain summit in the middle of the night. Officer McKee attempts to reunite an exotic pet with its owner. Sergeant Dakai confronts a hunter he suspects of illegally baiting bears.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Collision Course
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett track a hunter at an illegal bait site. Officers Towne, Matson and Jones investigate a teenage hunter with a changing story. And a routine patrol in icy conditions becomes a life-changing event for Officer Lucas.

programme.desc: Officer Towne responds to a call about a hunter cornered by a pack of dogs. Officer Hannett tries to coax the truth from suspicious hunters. Lt. Boudreau leads a large night hunting operation that quickly takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: Madagascar: Lost Worlds

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans

programme.title: Casanova Killers: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A woman is found dead and her boyfriend tries to help police catch the killer.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Up and coming lawyer Michael Fletcher can barely keep it together as he calls police to his suburban Detroit home. Upon arrival, officers find Fletcher's wife, Leann, dead from an apparent accidental self-inflicted gunshot wound.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Lethal Lovers
programme.desc: In Huntington Beach two well respected doctors, Carolyn and Ken Stahl, are found shot to death on the side of a highway. As police unravel this baffling case they find the power couple had a less than perfect marriage.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Wife and mother of three Stephanie Roller Bruner has a wonderful life, so her disappearance days before Thanksgiving leads to a massive search. When information of a secret love triangle comes out, the case takes a drastic turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Kelley Cannon
programme.desc: After a back injury left her abusing drugs, Kelley Cannon's life fell apart and was involved in a murder mystery that shocked Nashville.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Burning Bed
programme.desc: She, a beautiful, ambitious, real estate agent and he, the fun-loving owner of a local lounge. In this story, a tumultuous 2-year romance leads to fiery passion and then murder, a shocking tale of love gone awry.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Poser
programme.desc: Ex-Marine Raymond 'R.J.' McLeod seems like a knight in shining armor to one single mom, but as John Walsh reveals, she was far from safe. Then, Callahan Walsh discovers how rapper Maurice Nesbitt's constant abuse of his girlfriend eventually turns deadly.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: Sinister Ministers: Collared: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Like a wolf in sheep's clothing, a preacher with a blood lust tricks a small community into letting him be their pastor. Then a cross- dressing priest earns the title 'Monsignor Meth' when he takes on a different kind of calling.

programme.title: Sinister Ministers: Collared: Sacrament of Evil
programme.desc: A priest who is suspected of sexually abusing teenage boys stops at nothing to cover his tracks. Then an illicit passionate affair between two pastors meets a bloody end.

programme.title: Sinister Ministers: Collared: Lambs to the Slaughter
programme.desc: A pastor from Baltimore is so consumed by greed that he is prepared to kill for profit. Then Jimmy Swaggart, a tele-evangelist has the most famous sex scandal of the 1980s when he is caught with a hooker in a seedy motel.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Mother Gone Missing
programme.desc: February, 2009: 32 year-old Becky Brosnan has disappeared. A Myspace message says she's left 'to find herself,' but everyone says Becky wouldn't abandon her children. Now, detectives must piece together Becky's life to uncover what happened to her.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder in the Chat Room
programme.desc: In the wake of a broken marriage, 28-year old Samantha Lezark's struggle to find love again has a fatal ending. Now, investigators must follow her digital trail through different chat rooms to uncover her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Parents return home from a trip to find blood everywhere, signs of struggle and their teenage daughter missing. Police combing the desert for her stumble on her charred remains digital clues soon lead them to a shocking secret and a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: November 2014, Tiffanie Adams' body is found in a field. A small town sheriff must retrace the expectant mom's steps to catch a cold blooded killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: John is Calling
programme.desc: A nineteen year-old college student and convenience store clerk vanishes in Sheridan, Wyoming.

programme.title: True Conviction: Murder in New England
programme.desc: After grandmother Irene Kennedy is found dead in a park, her family is split apart when a distant relative is charged with her murder. It will take years, another killing and a jail house snitch to bring the family back together.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Stalker
programme.desc: After computer whiz Cari Farver goes missing, she starts sending threatening text messages to a new boyfriend, his ex-lover and her mother.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bill Doolin and The Oklahombres
programme.desc: In the 1890s, the Frontier had vanished, but in Bill Doolin, its spirit burned on. He terrorized Oklahoma with his brazen robberies and fought the greatest shootout in Western history.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill its Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: The Mob Rat: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Apartment Refresh
programme.desc: Nicole's grandparents' house sits on a sprawling five-acre parcel and has an apartment. Taking a break from the main house renovation, Nicole tackles the apartment with a series of fun, chic changes that don't cost a fortune.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Hearts of the Home
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles the heart of her Grandparents' home, the living room and dining room. The most 'photographed' rooms in the house, these projects present Nicole with a very clear visual template to work from.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bedroom Revival
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles one of her biggest challenges yet. She tackles all of the original bedrooms in the home built by her grandparents. The previous owners trashed the original and design, now it's up to her to fix their mistakes.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Reclaiming the Rec Room
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the basement. With space at a premium, Nicole must battle water, structural problems, dilapidated windows, and poorly placed duct work to turn a neglected area into a much needed gathering space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Reborn
programme.desc: After an improperly winterized basement bathroom springs some serious leaks, Nicole remains determined to rebuild the bathroom better than ever. She also adds an egress window to the basement and builds out a basement guest suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: One Extraordinary Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole adds gutters, a new driveway and entirely does the house in stucco like the original. To complete this magnificent transformation Nicole restores the original brick front porch and tops everything off with some tasteful, but stunning landscaping.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Roof Renovation Donation
programme.desc: Nicole is back on Campbell Street helping her 85-year-old veteran neighbour, Art, repair his home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Red Barn Reborn
programme.desc: Nicole takes on her most personal project yet, her grandfather's red barn. The barn has fallen into disrepair and requires a great deal of structural work to make it safe and strong.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Massive Mud Home
programme.desc: Summer and Jack moved away from New Jersey after getting engaged to live off the grid. They buy a plot of land in Sedro Wooley, Washington and have commissioned Sunray Kelley to design and build their dream mud home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Wine Country vs. Lake House
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina are inspired to make a vineyard-themed design that lends itself to entertaining after winning a house that was moved from Texas Hill Country. Meanwhile, Donna and Toni need help from friends to renovate two homes.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' School Bus Flip vs. Gary and Jerry's Portable Pad
programme.desc: The Snow Sisters get a school bus from their father and decide to turn it into a motorhome inspired by an old travel bus he customized years ago. Meanwhile, Gary and Jerry make a portable house by putting a shed on a trailer.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Duplex Doozy vs.Randy's Rec Room Reno
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a duplex at auction and plan to combine the two sides into a single, seamless dwelling. Meanwhile, Randy rehabs an old garage to create a functional home with a game room and custom bathroom.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Kid-friendly Home vs. Family-friendly Home
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina win a gutted house and turn it into a functional family home that features a stunning kitchen with a walk-in pantry and outside decorative dormers. Meanwhile, Gary's girls create a family-friendly home with unique ways to save space.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Elevator Barn Build vs. Casey and Catrina's Two-Story Chalet
programme.desc: Gary's Girls turn a bare-bones barn into a two-story house. A buyer contacts them early in the build with some special requests. Casey and Catrina win big when they obtain a small farmhouse with a bonus room upstairs.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Grain Bin vs. Casey and Catrina's Barndominium
programme.desc: Gary's Girls purchase a 27-foot grain bin and formulate a plan to make it livable while maintaining its unusual look. Casey and Catrina have big ideas for a rusty, old barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Alton Crown Affair
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that crown roast of lamb can be a dish to shock and awe.

programme.title: Good Eats: Gravy Confidential

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius

programme.title: Movie: The Town
programme.desc: While planning his next bank heist, a career criminal juggles his feelings for a bank manager from a previous robbery.

programme.title: Movie: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: The prequel to the Hollywood classic, Planet of the Apes, begins in San Francisco when man's attempts to push the boundaries of science results in the rise of genetically modified apes who threaten to take over the world.

programme.title: Movie: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between two worlds, Hellboy, a half-man, half-demon must defeat an ancient sorceress.

programme.title: Watchmen: A God Walks Into ABar
programme.desc: Angela's mysterious past in Vietnam is at last revealed.

programme.title: His Dark Materials: The Daemon-Cages
programme.desc: Two children wander throughout exciting and dangerous parallel universes.

programme.title: Movie: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between two worlds, Hellboy, a half-man, half-demon must defeat an ancient sorceress.

programme.title: Torn Apart: Separated at the Border
Movie: Cedar Rapids
programme.desc: A man leaves his sleepy town for the first time in 34 years to represent his insurance company at a convention.

programme.title: Movie: It's Kind of a Funny Story
programme.desc: After checking himself into an adult psychiatric ward, a clinically depressed teenager gets a fresh start.

programme.title: 24/7: Kelly Slater
programme.desc: A revealing look inside the the surfer's life as he prepares for the Billabong Pipe Masters in Oahu, Hawaii.

programme.title: Movie: Kin
programme.desc: On the same day that his older brother is released from prison, a boy finds a deadly alien weapon in a junkyard. With a revenge-seeking crime lord, inquisitive government agents and dangerous alien soldiers all after them, the brothers go on the run.

programme.title: Movie: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: After losing a match, a fighter seeks revenge on his opponent in the ring.

programme.title: Moonlight Sonata: Deafness in Three Movements
programme.desc: This film is a memoir about a deaf boy growing up, and his deaf grandfather growing old.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Having returned from fighting in the Crusades, Robin Hood turns to thievery as a way of rebelling against the tyrannical Sheriff of Nottingham. With the help of his Merry Men, he comes up with a daring plan to empty the Sheriff's own treasury.

programme.title: Movie: Unknown
programme.desc: After awakening from a coma, a man discovers that his identity has been stolen.

programme.title: Movie: I, Robot
programme.desc: In 2035, robots that have been programmed to never hurt humans have become part of the daily lives of people. When the main suspect in the murder of a scientist is a robot, a robot-hating detective begins to wonder if humans are actually safe.

programme.title: Movie: Night School
programme.desc: A man who's tired of his dead-end life and humiliating job signs up for night school so that he can pass the GED exam and finally be a high school graduate, but with an eclectic group of students the teacher turns to unconventional ways of teaching.

programme.title: Movie: Me, Myself and Irene
programme.desc: A police officer's split personalities vie for a woman who is in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: Out of Sight
programme.desc: An escaped robber plots to rob a tycoon and seduce the federal marshal sent to catch him.

programme.title: Movie: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A 1950's Hollywood fixer for a movie company cleans up after big names and stars in the industry, but must deal with more than fixing problems when a star disappears.

programme.title: The Number on Great-Grandpa's Arm
programme.desc: A conversation between a boy and his great-grandfather, an Auschwitz survivor, is woven with historical footage and animation to tell a heartbreaking story of Jewish life in Eastern Europe.

programme.title: Movie: First Man
programme.desc: In the lead-up to his historic walk on the moon's surface, astronaut Neil Armstrong struggles with the magnitude and dangers of the mission, while his wife finds it difficult to support his trip that is likely to cost their children their father.

programme.title: Dan Soder: Son of a Gary
programme.desc: Comedian and actor Dan Soder ('Billions,' 'The Standups') will headline his first hour-long comedy special for HBO.

programme.title: Movie: Little Fockers
programme.desc: A tightly wound father-in-law still has doubts about his son-in-law, even after 10 years of marriage to his daughter.

programme.title: Watchmen: It's Summer and We're Running Out of Ice
programme.desc: In an alternate America where police conceal their identities behind masks to protect themselves from a terrorist organization, Detective Angela Abar and Chief Judd Crawford investigate the attempted murder of a cop.

programme.title: Watchmen: Martial Feats of Comanche Horsemanship
programme.desc: As Angela relives haunting memories of an attack on her family, she detains a mysterious man who claims responsibility for Tulsa’s most recent murder. Elsewhere, an original play is performed for an audience of one.

programme.title: Watchmen: She Was Killed by Space Junk
programme.desc: Following a late-night visit from the Senator who authored Masked Policing Legislation in Oklahoma, FBI agent Laurie Blake heads to Tulsa to take over the recent murder investigation. Far away, the Lord of the Estate draws unwelcome attention.

programme.title: Watchmen: If You Don't Like My Story, Write Your Own
programme.desc: Reclusive trillionaire Lady Trieu finally enters the stage with a mysterious offer. With Blake getting closer to the truth of her coverup, Angela enlists Looking Glass for help. Meanwhile, the Lord trains two new servants.

programme.title: Movie: Second Act
programme.desc: A talented but uneducated woman stuck in a low-paying job gets a call out of the blue for an interview with a well-paying company. After landing the job, she learns that it's due to a fake Facebook profile set up in her name that makes her look great.

programme.title: Movie: The Help
programme.desc: Racial barriers crumble as three women form unlikely friendships in a small American town.

programme.title: The L Word: Generation Q: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: Ten years after we last left them, we find Bette running for mayor of Los Angeles. Shane returns to the city after a setback and Alice is learning to balance co-parenting with her fiancé Nat and Nat's ex-wife Gigi.

programme.title: Shameless: Sparky
programme.desc: Frank hatches the idea for a new scheme when an unexpected visitor shows up at the Gallagher house. With Tami back in the house, Lip struggles to give up control of Fred. Debbie's fight for child support escalates and Carl juggles multiple romances.

programme.title: Movie: Green Book
programme.desc: An acclaimed black pianist hires a white man to be his driver and bodyguard for his tour of the Jim Crow south, and as they set out for the long trip they realize that they have nothing in common, but as the trip goes on they forge a strong bond.

programme.title: The L Word: Generation Q: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: Ten years after we last left them, we find Bette running for mayor of Los Angeles. Shane returns to the city after a setback and Alice is learning to balance co-parenting with her fiancé Nat and Nat's ex-wife Gigi.

programme.title: Work In Progress: 180 Almonds
programme.desc: Abby begins an existential life evaluation vowing mortal consequences after 180 days. Her therapist checks out mid-session and a first fate turns into a confrontation with the woman responsible for 'ruining her life.'

programme.title: Shameless: Sparky
programme.desc: Frank hatches the idea for a new scheme when an unexpected visitor shows up at the Gallagher house. With Tami back in the house, Lip struggles to give up control of Fred. Debbie's fight for child support escalates and Carl juggles multiple romances.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: Hispes
programme.desc: Mayor Feratti ups the ante in his negotiations with the Sullivans, and Ray must step in to finish the deal. Bridget and Smitty are called in to fix Jonathan Walker Hanson's unsavory publicity scandal. Daryll is offered a chance to leave the Donovans.

programme.title: Movie: The Professor
programme.desc: A college professor begins to live a reckless, rebellious life after being diagnosed with a terminal illness.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: When Harry Met Sally
programme.desc: A star-crossed, neurotic couple repeatedly drift apart and meet again over a span of 13 years, always teetering on the edge of romance.

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2019 Week 14
programme.desc: Mike Tomlin's impressive coaching job in Pittsburgh and Jimmy Garoppolo's inspired play after the 49ers' big win over New Orleans are discussed. Plus, hall of famer and New York Giants legend Lawrence Taylor joins to review some of his greatest plays.

programme.title: Movie: The House With a Clock in Its Walls
programme.desc: A 10-year-old orphan sent to live with his uncle learns that magic is real, and that his uncle is a warlock. He begins learning magic, but when he uses it to impress a classmate he accidentally releases a great evil that threatens the entire world.

programme.title: Movie: The Man Who Invented Christmas
programme.desc: After his last few books have flopped, author Charles Dickens is desperate for a hit. When the inspiration for 'A Christmas Carol' strikes, the characters seem to come to life before his eyes as he tries to get the book written in only a few weeks.

programme.title: Movie: At Eternity's Gate
programme.desc: Painter Vincent van Gogh's last days play out in a sleepy country village in the south of France. Although his art is unappreciated by the locals, he finds beauty in even the most benign scenes, and a charismatic local priest helps lead him to Christ.

programme.title: Movie: Peppermint
programme.desc: A grieving mother takes justice into her own hands after corrupt officials let her husband and daughter's killers walk free. She begins violently dismantling the massive cartel that has the local police officers, judges and officials on its payroll.

programme.title: Movie: Jack and Jill
programme.desc: A family man gets ready for the annual visit from his needy twin sister, Jill.

programme.desc: Joe and Tahiry's destiny continues to intertwine. K. Michelle pushes Peter to reconcile with Amina as Tara takes steps to move on. Saigon makes a brash move and Erica Mena's love triangle explodes.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Red Alert
programme.desc: Tahiry and Rashidah clash while Erica Mena and a new rival fight for territory. Joe decides to stake his claim as Tara and K. Michelle take the plunge on a double date. Rich finally admits his love.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Put a Ring on It
programme.desc: Joe proposes to Tahiry in Times Square as Rich confronts Erica Mena and Cyn in the studio.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Worlds collide at Erica Mena's performance as Rich reveals the final truth to Cyn. Nick Cannon convinces Peter to seal the deal while Yandy and Mendecees plot their future. Tahiry and Rashidah meet for their final battle.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: The Reunion - Part One
programme.desc: The case reunites and get to the bottom of this season's messy love triangles and relationships. Drama ensues with shocking reveals and explosive words, both on and off stage.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: The Reunion - Part Two
programme.desc: The reunion picks up right where it left off and starts with a shocking reveal. Drama ensues with explosive words, both on and off stage.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Working It Out
programme.desc: To keep her new job as an assistant to a movie star, Hilary accepts a date with Jazz.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Did the Earth Move for You?
programme.desc: When an earthquake strikes, strange things happen to the relationships in Will's family.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Mother of All Battles
programme.desc: An all-out war ensues between Ashley's parents and those of a girl who is harassing her.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Gets a Job
programme.desc: Will gets a job so he can pay his own way.

programme.title: Martin: Control
programme.desc: When Gina accidentally throws out Martin's basketball tickets, she tries to get replacement tickets from Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend
programme.desc: A jealous Martin scares away Gina's new male friend, but he regrets his actions when Gina forces him to go shopping with her.

programme.title: Martin: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: An accident happens when Martin and Gina are caring for Mama Payne's beloved parrot.

programme.title: Martin: Fat Like Dat
programme.desc: When Gina convinces Martin that he's gaining weight, he and the guys take dieting and exercise to the extreme.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 1)
programme.desc: After Gina and Pam get promotions, Martin realizes his job is going nowhere.

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Martin takes steps to ensure that he gets on Varnel Hill's talk show.

programme.title: Martin: Thanks for Nothing
programme.desc: Thanksgiving gets interesting when Martin's relatives and Gina's parents come to dinner.

programme.title: Martin: Whoop There It Ain't
programme.desc: Pam challenges Gina and Martin to see if they can abstain from having sex for two weeks.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Please and Thank You
programme.desc: Remy Ma gets to the bottom of the rumors about Juju. Anais struggles to balance her home life and career. Rich Dollaz takes on a new challenge with the help of Jaquae. Kimbella confronts Juelz about his addiction.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Triggers
programme.desc: Maino helps his girlfriend Maggie takes steps to overcome her PTSD. Yandy fails to broker peace between Juju, Jonathan, and Anais. Rumors about Safaree's robbery come to light from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Gwinners and Losers
programme.desc: Safaree breaks the internet when a social media war with his ex sends MariahLynn and DJ Self into a tailspin. Jonathan comes to terms with the loss of a loved one. Kimbella and Yandy come face to face, and Nya Lee faces her career demons.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Own Your Truth
programme.desc: Joe Budden and Cyn Santana reach a crossroads. Alexis Skyy confronts rumours about her label. Jonathan receives shocking news about Anais. Rich Dollaz gets real about Sidney Starr's talent. Kimbella and Juelz Santana have a talk with their kids.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Hard Choices
programme.desc: Safaree cashes in on his anaconda. Joe Budden and Cyn Santana struggle to deal with her depression. Nya Lee and Sidney Starr hit a bump in the road, and a new addition to Yandy's family may land her in legal trouble.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: A revelation from Cyn's childhood rocks her relationship with Joe Budden. Sidney Starr shows up and shows out for Nya Lee. Yandy digs into Infinity's past, and Rich Dollaz steps up as a father when Ashley's mother finds herself in serious trouble.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Sour Grapes
programme.desc: Rich faces the reality of Miracle's legal situation. Jonathan's peaceful trip goes up in flames when Nya Lee bumps heads with Sidney Starr and MariahLynn. Kimbella questions Yandy's motives in fostering Infinity and Alexis has a near death experience.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Crease the Timbs
programme.desc: Juelz Santana makes a grand gesture. Maino and Maggie butt heads over her career. Alexis Skyy tries to move forward without her label. Sidney Starr takes steps toward sex reassignment surgery, and Rich Dollaz gets a surprise visit from an old flame.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Tidings of Joy
programme.desc: A writer visits a town searching for a rumoured Christmas time capsule.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Dollywood
programme.desc: When a NYC event planner returns to Tennessee to plan the Christmas celebration at Dollywood, she's paired with the head of operations who thinks he can handle the party just fine on his own.

programme.title: Movie: A Cheerful Christmas
programme.desc: As a 'Christmas Coach' a woman provides her clients with all the magic of the holidays. In order to make her new clients vision a success, she is tasked with working with their son, to find out all of their holiday traditions.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Detour
programme.desc: Two NYC-bound travellers find themselves linked when a storm waylays their flight to an airport hotel in Buffalo. Desperate to get home in time for Christmas, a woman seeks help, in any form, to make a Christmas miracle happen.

programme.title: Movie: Snow Bride
programme.desc: A reporter pretends to be the girlfriend of the son of a famous politician to help him save face over Christmas. She becomes torn between exposing newsworthy scoops about the famous family and trusting that she's falling in love for real.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: A Christmas amateur finds himself in charge of his family's holiday celebration. Desperate for help, he enlists an expert in all things Christmas and together, they discover what's truly important in life.

programme.title: Movie: A Bride for Christmas
programme.desc: A woman swears off marriage for good, until she truly falls in love, unaware she's been handpicked to help the man win a bet to prove he can get a woman to say 'yes' to his marriage proposal by Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Rome
programme.desc: An American tour guide working in Rome agrees to give a tour to a businessman. The two quickly learn that when in Rome, love prevails.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cure
programme.desc: An emergency room doctor returns home for Christmas and reunites with old friends and family and is asked to take over her dad's old practice. The doctor must now choose between a new life and an old one.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Pastry chef Buddy Valastro visits and he whips up gingerbread sandwich cookies. Then, 'Skillet Love' author Anne Byrn cooks a skillet pot pie and celebrity chef Sherry Yard prepares a caramelized banana tart.

programme.title: Movie: Best Christmas Party Ever
programme.desc: An up-and-coming event planner finds out that her boss intends to hand the business to her nephew. Tensions run high when she is forced to train and plan for the biggest holiday party of the season.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Mix-Up
programme.desc: A woman is headed to spend the holidays with her fiancé's family, but a mix up at the airport lands her at the wrong home. She quickly forms a bond with the 'wrong' family, especially the handsome son.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: Movie: 21 Jump Street

programme.title: Movie: Tammy

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: Experts empower women seeking personal and professional growth in career and family.

programme.title: Movie: Always and Forever Christmas
programme.desc: A woman inherits a year-round Christmas store in a small town.

programme.title: Movie: Snowed-Inn Christmas
programme.desc: Polar-opposite publicists are forced to spend Christmas together in Santa Claus, Indiana while writing a story. The focus of their story shifts after learning the historic town is in trouble, so they must put aside their differences and work together.

programme.title: Movie: Dear Secret Santa
programme.desc: After breaking up with her boyfriend, a woman moves back into the house she grew up in, brining back memories of the boy next door who recently passed away. One day she receives a Christmas card from a secret admirer she believes to be the same boy.

programme.title: Movie: Staging Christmas
programme.desc: Asked to stage a home for the holidays, a young woman finds the owner is also in need for some holiday cheer.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed JonBenet Ramsey
programme.desc: Investigating a wide range of suspects and evidence in the killing of JonBenet, including the Ramsey's maid, and the man who portrayed Santa Claus at a holiday party, only days before JonBenet was found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: True Crime Live
