programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Hawaii
programme.desc: Hawaii has stunning scenery, warm trade winds and white sand beaches. But in order to live in this isolated tropical paradise, these six homeowners had to build their homes to withstand tsunamis, excessive rain and seismic activity.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Alaska
programme.desc: From cliffs and rising lakes to the threat of grizzlies and earthquakes, these six homeowners create their Alaskan dream homes with limited resources. It will take determination, ingenuity, and cold hard cash.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Tangled in the Tide
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier Extras: Eivin and Atz Sr. face the dangers of a rocky beach after getting tangled in mooring line. Atz Lee and Jane teach the kids how to fish and Otto and Charlotte give Eve a memorable gift.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Christmas Wonderland Woes
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier Extras: Unseasonably warm weather threatens to ruin the Kilchers' Christmas plans but the ever-adaptable family finds a way to throw a memorable holiday party anyway.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Masters of Disaster
programme.desc: While fishing, Eivin and Eve discover a tangle of old nets choking the river and launch a risky clean-up operation. Charlotte and Otto rebuild a rotting deck, while Jane and Jewel process fresh milk. Later, the Kilcher family is tested by Mother Nature.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: A hungry bear spooks the livestock and the Browns think their new young ostriches are partially to blame. Later, windmill assembly goes to all-new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Christmas in the Bush
programme.desc: The Brown family celebrates Christmas in their own unique way. Sharing special family traditions and what they love most about the holiday.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Masters of Disaster
programme.desc: While fishing, Eivin and Eve discover a tangle of old nets choking the river and launch a risky clean-up operation. Charlotte and Otto rebuild a rotting deck, while Jane and Jewel process fresh milk. Later, the Kilcher family is tested by Mother Nature.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alarmed and Dangerous
programme.desc: With hope of redeeming themselves after their disastrous first hauling job, the four eldest Brown brothers prepare for a second solo mission. Then, two very different visitors show up in Browntown.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bush Heart
programme.desc: Matt, Bam, Bear, and Gabe feel the strain of making deliveries in harsh conditions. Meanwhile, circumstances back in Browntown force a decision that will change the lives of the wolf pack forever.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: The El Camino King
programme.desc: Brotherly love reignites over a 1968 El Camino. Beep and Holley can't agree on how to flip a 1976 Corvette Sting Ray.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: Colby Takes Over
programme.desc: The flippers work on a '39 Chevy Coupe, a '62 Ford Ranchero and a '95 Mustang GT. Old Skool Kustoms pays tribute to a famous hot rod.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: Let the Rivalries Begin
programme.desc: The battle begins as a 1964 Thunderbird, 2002 Nissan Xterra and a 1955 Ford Fairlane are auctioned off.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: The crew find an abandon package that looks a little suspicious. A late model Mercedes-Benz seems like a good flip.

programme.title: Texas Car Wars: Tale of the Filthy Greengo
programme.desc: The battle is on for a '64 Mercury comet caliente, a 1995 Jeep Wranger and a Ford F-100 Unibody pickup.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: The Dirty 7 vs. New England
programme.desc: A mega-truck racing crew from Central Florida, the Dirty 7, are challenging teams from all over the country to find the fastest crew. They race team New England in the Pit: a 405 ft track of mud designed to put the trucks to the test for pride and money.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: The Dirty 7 vs. South Carolina
programme.desc: Team South Carolina head down to Florida to challenge The Dirty 7. With both money and pride on the line, it's a mad scramble to get the trucks ready in time to race. They will have to push their motors to the limit and battle it out in The Pit.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: The Dirty 7 vs. Georgia
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 is undefeated, but this week a crew of ultra-light trucks from Georgia is headed down to The Pit to challenge them. The Dirty 7 will put their record and their reputation on the line as they battle a team known for their pedal-down speed.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: The Dirty 7 vs. Florida
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 suffered their first defeat last weekend but now their local rivals, The Florida Killers, are looking to deliver a knock-out punch to win. The guys must use every ounce of horsepower to knock their competition out and end up on top.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: New Heights
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 are back and ready to prove they're still the baddest in the country. Armed with upgraded trucks and even a few new ones, the guys prepare for an epic rematch against Team Georgia, the only team to ever beat them in the Pit.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Busting at the SEMA
programme.desc: Last year the Dieselsellerz put their insane builds on the map when they debuted their legendary MegaRam at the SEMA trade show in Vegas. With less than two weeks to go, it's all hands on deck to finish a 6-wheel drive F550 in time for the big show.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: From Sweden With Love
programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz are cranking out their next giveaway: a quad cab Dodge with a 12-valve. When Black Rhino tools asks the guys for a show-stopping build for a trade show, they pull out all the stops- including importing a surprise from Sweden.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Good Things Come to Those Who Wait
programme.desc: With only three months to go until her big day, indecisive bride June is under pressure to find a gown TODAY.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Curves and Curveballs
programme.desc: Bride Zelda must win over her family after revealing she got engaged over the phone and hasn't seen her fiancé in 12 years. Then, after losing 50 pounds, bride Emma debates buying an even smaller gown and losing more weight before her big day.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Submerged

programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a puppy with a mysterious and painful injury. Shelter volunteers drive from Kansas hoping Dr. Jeff's team can save a tiny rescued dog hit by a car. And the team travel to Tennessee to help Jeff's cousin provide free vet care.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Calendar Boys
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne must decide during surgery if a giant schnauzer can keep his ear. A poodle named Jay-Z with suspicious symptoms needs Dr. Blue's help. Dr. Ross removes tumors from a rat. The vets pose with pets for a calendar to help animals in Haiti.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby on Board
programme.desc: Rare silvery gibbons Alven and Tilu are expecting a new addition. But when the new baby arrives, it's up to Dad, Alven, to keep their older son, reckless teenager, Eko, in check.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Cut Loose

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Don't Blow It
programme.desc: Tia gives each of the parolees an opportunity to pursue their dreams, but for Bryan the path is rockier and could end in disaster.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Winter Is Here
programme.desc: As the first snow falls, the Brown Family makes a risky attempt to move their temporary shelters closer to the barn in hopes of bringing father Billy back home. Noah uses his ingenuity to prepare he and his pregnant wife Rhain Alisha for her first winter.

programme.title: The New Edition Story
programme.desc: The lives of five childhood friends from the projects of Roxbury, Massachusetts will forever change after they form a singing group to win local talent shows and ultimately become the legendary R&B group, New Edition.

programme.title: The New Edition Story
programme.desc: Though New Edition became R&B sensations, their fame came at a steep price, as internal tension and external pressure lead them to put business before friendship.

programme.title: The New Edition Story
programme.desc: When New Edition reaches unparalleled heights of success, will they finally be able to put their differences behind them or will their unresolved wounds lead to their undoing?

programme.title: Movie: Good Deeds
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman's predictable life changes when he meets a single mother who lives a modest life.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret

programme.title: Martin: Do the Fight Thing

programme.title: Martin: I Saw Gina Kissing Santa Claus
programme.desc: Martin reluctantly agrees to dress up as Santa Claus for Tommy's 'Big Brother' program.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Bump and Grind
programme.desc: Will and Sasha think that Brianna is pregnant. Meanwhile, Brown throws the Colonel a bachelor party.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Fake ID
programme.desc: Derek catches Brianna with a fake ID and Brown and Will become househusbands.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Talk
programme.desc: Dre, disappointed that Bow has already given Andre Jr. 'the talk' because she thinks he's too big of a prude to do it, decides to rectify matters by giving his son his version of 'the talk.'

programme.title: Black-ish: The Nod
programme.desc: Dre sets out to expand Andre Jr's social circle to include more black kids after he discovers Andre Jr. is clueless about 'the nod.' Meanwhile, hoping to inspire little Diane to become a doctor, Rainbow takes her to work at the hospital.

programme.title: Black-ish: Crazy Mom
programme.desc: When Dre agrees to take over Rainbow's 'mom' duties for a week, the overwhelming praise he gets from everyone at his kids’ school goes to his head. He soon finds himself pushing the envelope to outdo everyone, even the school's 'crazy mom.'

programme.title: Black-ish: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow agreed they would no longer spank their kids, all bets might be off when Jack disobeys. Now, Zoey, Junior, Diane and a nervous Jack are afraid that their parents will go back on their word.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Prank King
programme.desc: Dre fears his holiday fun will be ruined when the older kids balk at the glorious Johnson Halloween tradition of seeing who can pull the most outlandish pranks on each other.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Gift of Hunger
programme.desc: After the kids turn their collective noses up at Dre's favourite cheap restaurant in his old 'hood, he decides it's time to give them a reality check. He insists all of them get jobs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Oedipal Triangle
programme.desc: Dre's mother, Ruby, comes for a visit, and she smothers her pork chops with gravy, Dre with love, and would like to flat out smother Bow, who feels the same way about her.

programme.desc: Trapped at a remote research station, Burt Gummer and his son Travis must fend off weaponized Graboids.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Evolution
programme.desc: A werewolf and a vampire, forbidden lovers, attempt to unlock the secret behind their tribes' feud.

programme.title: Movie: Power Rangers

programme.title: Movie: Skyfall
programme.desc: The charming James Bond faces another challenging situation as M deals with her power being threatened. Past events are revealed, as James Bond is possibly the only agent able to help M through this troubling time as action-packed attacks wage on.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Family Home Refresh
programme.desc: A couple that bought their home when they were newlyweds are frustrated by the dated kitchen, total lack of storage and closed-off main floor. Jonathan and Drew overhaul the spaces to create a fresh, modern home that will work for years to come.

programme.title: White House Christmas 2019
programme.desc: It's that time of year again when the White House is transformed into a holiday showpiece. From celebrating children in the Red Room to honoring the military in the East Landing, Alison Victoria and Maureen McCormick give an inside look at the decorating.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Las Vegas Classic
programme.desc: A couple moves from the Las Vegas suburbs closer to the city into an older home they love with character. Johnathon and Drew help update their kitchen, office, mudroom and master bedroom to create the perfect home for the couple and their two sons.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: Bumming About the Plumbling
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Black Dahlia Murder
programme.desc: Christof digs into the most infamous -- and gruesome -- unsolved murder case in Los Angeles history. He uncovers an investigation derailed by corruption and finds a confession pointing him to a new suspect in the Philippines.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Boston's Unsolved Art Heist
programme.desc: Christof investigates the robbery of the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum, the largest art heist in history. In pursuit of the stolen masterpieces, he follows leads from dangerous members of organized crime that take him from Boston to Florida and France.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt for D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: A century ago, New Orleans was terrorized by an axe murderer. Now Christof discovers new leads that could point to some of the earliest mafia hits. This gruesome crime spree takes him from the Big Easy to Sicily and Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Butch Cassidy's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Christof uncovers new clues about the true fate of outlaws Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid. He travels to the highlands of Bolivia and the mountains of Utah to dig up evidence that may finally solve this 100-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lindbergh Kidnapping
programme.desc: Christof investigates the Lindbergh kidnapping, a story that made his grandfather's journalism career. Now, using his grandfather's notes and recently declassified FBI files, Christof tracks down surprising new leads to Germany and even the Nazi Party.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lost Treasure of Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: Christof joins the decades-long hunt for the buried millions of notorious gangster Dutch Schultz. Armed with rare documents and cutting-edge tech, Christof follows the fugitive mob boss's trail from Saratoga Springs, New York, to Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Vinny knows all to well that criminals who go missing, often are the most dangerous.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: On the Stroll
programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: Detectives hunt down a dangerous woman on the run after she slashed a former friend in the face with a box cutter.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Tommy and his team are back on the trail of a dangerous fugitive who was convicted for armed robbery and assault, and was deported over ten years ago.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Roxanne's First Fugitive
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Unthinkable
programme.desc: Officers search for a sex offender on the run, and aim to find him before sunrise.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Relentless
programme.desc: Detectives search for a 31-year-old male fugitive wanted for first-degree murder and weapons possession.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: American Justice: Who Killed the Candy Heiress?: The Helen Brach Story
programme.desc: The strange case of candy heiress Helen Brach, who disappeared without a trace in 1977.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 100%, Every Time
programme.desc: Randy and Justin chase down a suspected car thief, while both EMT teams respond to emergency calls involving children in distress.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: We Are Nightwatch Nation
programme.desc: Patrick and Danelle from Yonkers, New York, go above and beyond to help a schizophrenic patient who's had a hard time being taken seriously in the past. Far away in Austin, Texas, Holly and Chris have a scary run-in with poison control.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Dragged to Hell
programme.desc: Amanda Storms watches her high school sweetheart transform from great stepdad to abusive husband. When he moves out, she's grateful for the help of her friend Andrew Shepherd - until a terrible night of violence changes everything.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: I Speak For Amy
programme.desc: College athlete Kayleigh Ballantyne is returning home one night when she is violently attacked. As she battles for her life, she is unaware that elsewhere in the city an investigation is already underway following the discovery of a young woman's body.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Good Neighbor
programme.desc: Excited about a fresh start, young single mom Savannah and her son move to a new neighbourhood. When her seemingly friendly next-door neighbor offers her help, she has no idea that a dangerous obsession will grow on the other side of her wall.

programme.title: Before I Die: In the line of Duty
programme.desc: January 28, 1986, Deputy Floyd Moore is locking up. He sees a man acting suspiciously. Floyd calls for back-up, which arrives moments too late as Floyd is shot in the head. The man's ID is found hidden in Floyd's pocket and the hunt is on.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Officer Down
programme.desc: A beloved detective is killed during a shootout in at a downtown Atlanta hotel. His fellow officers, and his own son, work hard to bring the shooters to justice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: Before I Die: In the line of Duty
programme.desc: January 28, 1986, Deputy Floyd Moore is locking up. He sees a man acting suspiciously. Floyd calls for back-up, which arrives moments too late as Floyd is shot in the head. The man's ID is found hidden in Floyd's pocket and the hunt is on.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Officer Down
programme.desc: A beloved detective is killed during a shootout in at a downtown Atlanta hotel. His fellow officers, and his own son, work hard to bring the shooters to justice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Good Neighbor
programme.desc: Excited about a fresh start, young single mom Savannah and her son move to a new neighbourhood. When her seemingly friendly next-door neighbor offers her help, she has no idea that a dangerous obsession will grow on the other side of her wall.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Just a Wall Away
programme.desc: When writer Amy Neisis finds her dream apartment everything is set for a bright future. It's within her budget and she moves quickly to secure a sale. But four nights after moving a terrifying scream makes her realise she got more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Final Fantasy
programme.desc: An introverted high school student finds a soulmate in the new boy in town. They share a passion for fantasy and comic books, but their romance is jeopardized when she goes to college and he cannot contain his jealousy.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Campaign Trail of Fears
programme.desc: A Texas politician and his wife are stalked by their private pilot, who will stop at nothing to destroy them.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Never the Same
programme.desc: A mother and her teenage daughter are savagely murdered in their own home. Among the only clues police find in the nightmarish crime scene are a bloody bare footprint and an unharmed three-year-old girl with a heartbreaking story.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In The Dead of Night
programme.desc: Police must retrace a teenager's last known movements if they hope to find out when and where she crossed paths with her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: She's Gone
programme.desc: When a young girl kidnapped from her bed in the middle of the night is found dead in a nearby canal, it marks the beginning of one of Salt Lake City's most notorious child murder investigations.

programme.title: Dateline: Finding Savanna
programme.desc: A mother disappears with her 11-month-old daughter after losing a hotly contested custody battle. The father’s epic search for his child spans four continents and nearly two decades, with heartbreaking twists and an emotional conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: Angie Samota is murdered in her dorm. The stabbing shows lots of rage, giving police a clue: it must be someone close to Angie. Police question everyone close to Angie, but get nowhere. Decades pass and a college friend urges police to take another look.

programme.title: Dateline: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: A young woman and an older man commit a vicious crime.

programme.title: Dateline: A Perfect Spot
programme.desc: A romantic Valentine's Day tryst for a Georgia couple takes a deadly turn. Investigators find themselves stumped until evidence of tire treads at the crime scene and a string of cell phone calls reveal a twisted plot of deceit and murder.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Apartment 23
programme.desc: With graduation nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apartment. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right in front of them.

programme.title: American Nightmare: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Winter in Iowa gets an extra chill when Shirley Wilson's son finds her stabbed to death in her home. With no forced entry, detectives believe this grandmother of 12 knew her assailant, leaving the family wondering who has betrayed them in cold blood.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters
programme.desc: Uncovering new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials and influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: Military UFO Encounters
programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: Deep Sea UFO Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting our oceans.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Keeping Morale Up
programme.desc: A new season of builders brave the Alaskan elements to construct off-the-grid cabins. Jeff Erickson takes on a challenging cliffside build, Chappie Cook's team struggles to get materials to the site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Progress Is Messy
programme.desc: A SkyCrane helicopter delivers a whopping 17,000 pounds of materials for Chris Sewell's cabin kit, Jeff Erickson fights the pouring rain and cold temperatures to stay on schedule.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Going Vertical
programme.desc: Chappie Cook's team runs into bears and sinking boats while hauling scaffolding materials. Jeff Erickson carefully begins to construct his slippery roof and Chris Sewell works tirelessly to install all the timber walls of his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain Gear Is Going On
programme.desc: Chappie's team struggles to lift 600-pound rafters onto the cabin's roof. Then, Chris works on drying in his cabin while Jeff begins installing his cabin's windows.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Changer
programme.desc: Jeff struggles with his front deck. Chappie's team finds a major error while building the exterior insulation and Chris Sewell runs out of building materials.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Pam Hates
programme.desc: Don and Pam are close to retiring and want to be able to enjoy the next 20 years together in their beautiful backyard, but their 25-year-old deck is unsafe and needs a complete takedown and rebuild.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: West End Salvage: Breaking a Door Hoarding Habit
programme.desc: Don has piles of doors stashed away on the fourth floor and Hal is determined to thin the collection out. When they are hired to build a headboard, Hal suggests using several of the doors they have upstairs to create a gigantic showpiece.

programme.title: West End Salvage: Building a Bar for An Out of State Football Fan
programme.desc: Don is approached by clients who recently relocated from nearby Nebraska. The wife is in the middle of giving her football loving husband the ultimate Corn Husker haven in their basement, and they ask Don to complete the space with a bar.

programme.title: West End Salvage: Don Cracks the Whip to Get Projects Done for a Local Racetrack
programme.desc: Don and the guys are hired to create three different tailgating games for the track's 25,000 fans to use on race days. Each game needs to tie into automobile history, but the shop is short on vintage car parts and they only have two weeks.

programme.title: West End Salvage: Hose Hunters
programme.desc: Hal and Don accept the challenge of creating outdoor furniture. As a weather resistant material, Hal proposes using fire hose made from vinyl. Meanwhile, Brian buys a vintage washtub he plans to turn into a pedestal sink.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Neglected Craftsman Gets New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Chris and Aimee just bought a home that desperately needs help and Ally Mahon is up for the challenge. Ally is determined to take their fixer-upper and turn it into a beautiful new home for their growing family.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Victorian Upgrade
programme.desc: Ally helps a pair of homeowners upgrade their old Victorian home with a new front porch and a complete kitchen makeover. With a limited budget, Ally definitely has her work cut out for her, and the winter weather isn't doing her any favors either.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Colonial Meets Art Deco
programme.desc: After buying the vintage home of their dreams, a couple's plans of renovating fell by the wayside and they need help getting back on track. Ally's plans incorporate restored antique pieces while playing on the existing art deco accents.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Scandinavian Style Makeover
programme.desc: Ally gets a call to update and expand a vintage farmhouse for a family of six, including a more functional master bathroom with a sauna, and a more spacious and modern kitchen. With her skills for repurposing, she might just be able to pull it off.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: 1920s Fixer-Upper Gets a Chic Kitchen and Bedroom Renovation
programme.desc: After purchasing a fixer-upper that turned out to be more than she could handle, a new homeowner calls on Ally to help update her kitchen and bedroom to match her style.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Mid-century Masculine
programme.desc: A single father returns home from being deployed overseas hoping Ally can help him turn his ranch-style house into a family home for him and his two boys. Ally also reinvents the boys' bedrooms using reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Craftsman Inside and Out
programme.desc: Newlyweds ask Ally to build them a Craftsman kitchen that matches the rest of their house. While she's at it, they've also asked her to turn their mud pit of a backyard into one that's fit for entertaining.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: French Country Revival
programme.desc: A couple calls on Ally to help them celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary by renovating their beloved home. When she starts ripping out the 1920's farmhouse's walls she finds several surprises that slow her progress.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Entryway Transformation
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff Devlin and his team to restore their historic dining room and exterior facade. Jeff adds tons of historic charm to the exterior and completely transforms the dining room with a custom-built mud room nook.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1713 Dueling Fireplaces
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on to restore a dated foyer and a huge living room with two fireplaces in a 1713 stone house. He and his team must make the dueling fireplaces work together while also bringing warmth and historic charm to the spaces.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1732 Kitchen Relocation
programme.desc: Jeff visits a couple at their 1732 home to address their wish to build a new kitchen in their living room. During the renovation, they face a few bumps as they knock down a wall, relocate the plumbing and try to bring some history back to the space.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1735 Master Bedroom Retreat
programme.desc: Jeff meets up with a homeowner to restore the living room and bedroom in the oldest portion of her 1735 stone home. Jeff lowers an historic mantel in the living room and turns the master into a retreat with a wall of stone.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1750s Inn Revival
programme.desc: A couple that's in over their heads with their home that was once a historic inn calls on Jeff to turn two rooms into a tavern-like entertaining space. The team quickly find issues when they uncover the fireplace and try to install an exposed beam.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Mudroom From Scratch
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked with turning a couple's wide-open front porch into an enclosed mudroom that blends the 1740s stone portion of their home with the 1800s wood siding portion. He also uncovers a gorgeous stone fireplace while restoring the living room.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: Four talented bakers compete to have their cupcakes featured at the opening night party for the New York City Ballet's performance of 'The Nutcracker.'

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival Of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies On The Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Christmas Chowdown
programme.desc: Carla Hall has her table set for a food-filled holiday. Whether it's a Christmas tree made from a tower of waffles, a turducken turned into a mammoth po' boy or even the entire Feast of the Seven Fishes atop one pizza, 'tis the season for eating!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out San Juan, Puerto Rico's comfort foods, and beach eats.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hook, Line and Dinner
programme.desc: From a Jersey Shore eatery where lobster boats tie up next to the tables, to legendary seafood stew in San Diego and deep-fried stuffed crab in Baltimore, get hooked up with the most succulent, savory and spectacular seafood in the country!

programme.title: Food Paradise: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: From a password-protected cheeseburger in Chicago to top-notch barbecue in at a Walla Walla gas station, we try the most delicious dishes at the most surprising places across the country.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Come in for Comfort Food
programme.desc: Cozying up with old friends Bill Bellamy, Mario Lopez and his wife, Courtney, Tiffani is bringing out some of her comfort food favorites! Who doesn't love a gooey grilled cheese sandwich with caramelized onions.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Girls just want to have fun so Tiffani is brining Elizabeth Berley and Emily Procter over to the house for some delicious dinner and drinks. Tiffani makes grilled ciabatta with ricotta and snap peas.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Family Favorites With Friends
programme.desc: Tiffani dishes up some of her family favorites with friends Ross Mathews and the Scott brothers, Drew and Jonathan.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Tasty Childhood Favorites
programme.desc: Tiffani takes a walk down memory lane with friends French Stewart, Nicole Sullivan and Nate Berkus, putting a modern twist on favorites from her youth. Tiffani's updated Turkey Meatloaf is always a hit.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch for a Bunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is always prepared with this crowd-pleasing brunch menu.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Buon Appetito
programme.desc: Bobby fondly reminisces about his time spent in Italy as he comes up with an amazing brunch menu inspired by the flavors and food of the Italian Countryside.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Open House Brunch
programme.desc: An open house style brunch includes orange spiced crumb cake and creamy scrambled eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: The Big Easy
programme.desc: Inspired by what he calls one of the greatest food cities in America, Bobby creates a brunch menu that would make New Orleans proud.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocolate Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby is making a brunch that features chocolate as a star ingredient. Dishes include double chocolate pancakes with salted caramel syrup and mole rubbed steak and eggs with chocolate stout beurre blanc.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocoholic Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is covering the kitchen in chocolate for a luscious menu of sweet and savory treats like dark chocolate waffles with white chocolate custard sauce and espresso-chocolate whipped cream.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Waffles Gone Wild
programme.desc: Ordinary waffles be warned: Chef Bobby Flay has your number! Bobby wows with a menu of unexpected waffle creations like Cornbread Waffles with Ranch Style Eggs & Cilantro Crema and Glazed Waffle Donuts!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocolate Lovers Delight
programme.desc: Bobby puts together a decadent brunch based entirely around chocolate.

programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Between an Ock and a Hard Place
Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill / Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Secret of the Fused Bey!
programme.desc: Having discovered the fruits of Dr. Evel’s Blading research, Count Nightfell challenges Aiger to a friendly match.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: The Secret Princess!
programme.desc: An emotional look into the past reveals astounding people and places, and nothing will ever be the same again!

programme.title: Soccer
programme.desc: Boys Final

programme.title: E:60: Dream On: Stories From Boston's Strongest
programme.desc: The biggest names and best stories in sports.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Setenta E Sete
programme.desc: The story of the events surrounding the 2016 plane crash of the Brazilian soccer team, Chapecoense, is explored.

programme.title: E:60: Forever Broncos
programme.desc: A powerful one-hour special on the Humboldt Broncos one year after the bus crash that killed 16 members of the junior hockey team from Canada, featuring exclusive access and never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Heir McNair
programme.desc: The legendary career of NFL quarterback Steve McNair, ten years following his murder. In a rare series of interviews with his family, we learn how they coped with his death and how his athletic legacy is carried on by his son, Tyler.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Leaf
programme.desc: Sharing his descent from NFL fame to addiction, former quarterback Ryan Leaf tells his inspiring story of recovery and dedication to helping others.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Game One
programme.desc: After 40 years, ESPN reflects on the very first contest aired on the network, a softball game that took place in Lannon, Wisconsin.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Bonds of Earth
programme.desc: Learn how a soccer ball from astronaut Ellison Onizuka’s daughter’s teammates at a high school in Clear Lake, Texas, survived the tragic Challenger space shuttle explosion in January 1986 and finally completed its mission to space 31 years later.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Catching Kayla
programme.desc: Tom Rinaldi tells the remarkable story of Kayla Montgomery who, despite being diagnosed with multiple sclerosis, has become one of the best distance runners in the country.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Matt Millen: All Heart
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of NFL great Matt Millen's journey to an organ transplant.

programme.title: UFC Main Event: St-Pierre vs. Condit
programme.desc: Longtime champion Georges St-Pierre returns from injury for a title unification bout against teammate and interim champion Carlos Condit. See both athletes' long roads to this high-level match-up and the fight itself.

programme.title: Golic and Wingo
programme.desc: Longtime friends and veteran voices, Mike Golic and Trey Wingo, join forces to bring you your one-stop-morning-shop for the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.title: The Dan Le Batard Show
programme.desc: Thought-provoking discussion on the day’s sports stories, interviewing celebrities and players with Le Batard’s brand of self-depreciating humor.

programme.title: The Stephen A. Smith Show
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith offers up his unique perspectives on the world of sports and much more.

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Will Cain gives you his unfiltered take on the biggest stories in the sports world.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The Dynasty That Almost Was
programme.desc: Cleveland in the 1990s was an explosive offensive team that came close to greatness, but never captured a championship.

programme.title: Movie: Major League
programme.desc: A group of misfits are picked to form a baseball team that manages to surprise everyone.

programme.title: Movie: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: Two sisters join the first female professional baseball league during the Second World War and struggle to help it succeed despite their growing sibling rivalry.

programme.desc: A look at controversial figure Dave Parker who was the first ballplayer to get a million dollar contract and also one of the most outspoken and feared players who now faces a battle with Parkinson's disease and its impact.

programme.title: Movie: Red Sparrow

programme.title: Movie: By the Sea

programme.title: Movie: Gimme Shelter

programme.desc: A hockey fan is injured by a player at a game; Dispute between neighbors over loud music.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: The Bookplate/ Game of Drones
programme.desc: Men argue over the value of a book; a drone accident leads to injuries.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Jenkins vs. Hensley
programme.desc: A man breaks off an engagement and has one foot out the door because he doubts he fathered his girlfriend's 'miracle baby'.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Johnny Fell Down the Well/ No Fly Zone
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues over medical expenses; inappropriate behavior on a flight.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman was friends with a man for four years and says once they took their relationship to the next level, she realized it was a huge mistake. She’s suing him today for travel expenses, but her ex says he’s being sued for more than he owes.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Tossing TVs; what a clown; that's the way the cookie crumbles.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: The Grass Is Not Greener/ Woman to Woman
programme.desc: A dispute over front yard maintenance; a woman seeks reimbursement of medical expenses.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A man sues his girlfriend's estranged friend for an unpaid loan; she doesn't believe she's liable as she would drive the plaintiff and his girlfriend around. Then, a couple is suing for an unfinished remodelling job to their kitchen.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Accused of Child Abuse, I Need to Clear My Name
programme.desc: Jordan claims she never physically abused her one-year-old daughter, but grandmother Cathy doesn't know what to believe. When Sarena though her husband may have abused their son, she divorced him. Now, she wants to give him a chance, but needs the truth.

programme.title: Maury: My Daughter Should Stop Lying... That's Not Her Husband's Baby!
programme.desc: Rachel wants to prove her boyfriend Jonathan is the father of her son; Jonathan says he can't have kids due to an injury. Sharita says her ex is her baby's father, and that the other man she was with can't have kids. Shannon and Stephanie are back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Big Fat Lies
programme.desc: Lance says when it comes to his girlfriend Brittany he definitely overachieved. Now he’d like to take things to the next level and propose to her. Unfortunately, Lance learns he has some competition as someone else is contesting for Brittany’s heart.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: Rebound
programme.desc: A college basketball coach, who was banned from the court until he could curb his temper, accepts a position with a helpless team and tries to turn them around.

programme.title: Movie: An Ideal Husband
programme.desc: A husband's seemingly perfect life is threatened by evidence of a past misdeed.

programme.title: Movie: The A-Team
programme.desc: Four war veterans attempt to clear their names when the military suspects them of committing a crime.

programme.title: Movie: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: A Greek girl falls in love with a non-Greek man, which creates havoc amongst her family.

programme.title: Movie: A Fantastic Fear of Everything
programme.desc: A crime writer's research into Victorian-era serial killers has left him with a growing paranoia that he's constantly about to be murdered. When a Hollywood executive takes an interest in his script, he is forced to confront the demons that plague him.

programme.title: Movie: Papi Chulo
programme.desc: A lonely weatherman befriends a migrant worker.

programme.title: Movie: Puerto Ricans in Paris
programme.desc: Two Puerto Rican detectives, Luis and Eddie, are sent to Paris to find the stolen handbag designs of a major fashion designer. The hopelessly unhip pair attempt to navigate the city as they deal with high society fashion and its seedy black market.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Crime ...
programme.desc: A hapless American couple touring Europe become suspects in a wacky murder investigation.

programme.title: Movie: She Hate Me
programme.desc: After being fired from his job, an executive turns to impregnating women for profit.

programme.title: Movie: Shanghai Knights
programme.desc: In the 1880s, a sheriff and his sidekick travel to England to avenge a father's death.

programme.title: Movie: Chocolat
programme.desc: A mother and daughter open a chocolate shop in a small conservative French village.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Hope Floats
programme.desc: A woman returns to her hometown after discovering her husband was having an affair with her best friend.
